title: Return of Ranil: Remarkable Resilience of Premier Wickremesinghe
body_lines: Ranil Sriyan Wickremesinghe known as  Ranil is  in the seat of power again as Prime Minister of Sri Lanka for the sixth time.  The new Prime Minister was neither elected to office  by the people in a general  election  nor endorsed by a majority of MP’s in Parliament.  Ranil is the leader of  the United National Party(UNP) that had been roundly defeated at the last Parliamentary poll. He is the sole representative of the UNP in Parliament now. From Lone MP to new Prime Minister was how some newspapers described his assumption of office.

Ranil  was virtually catapulted into office through  very peculiar circumstances. He faces formidable challenges as Prime Minister of a failed, bankrupt state. The ramifications of  Ranil Wickremesinghe’s appointment  as  Prime Minister , the intricacies of the current political environment  and  the nature of play in Parliament in the future, would be delved into in greater  detail in the second part of this article.

As for now I am extracting a few inspiring  paragraphs from the  special statement made by Prime Minister Ranil Wickremesinghe on May 16th 2022. Ranil bared the truth about the perilous state of Sri Lanka’s economy  and that he has accepted the challenge of trying to resurrect it. He called upon everyone to support him in this endeavour. Here are the relevant paragraphs-:

“Last Thursday, I accepted office as the Prime Minister. I did not request this position. In face of the challenging situation facing the country, the President invited me to take up this position. I assumed this duty not only as a political leader, but also as national leader who has benefited from free education at the Faculty of Law of the University of Colombo.”
“The next couple of months will be the most difficult ones of our lives. We must prepare ourselves to make some sacrifices and face the challenges of this period.”

“I have no desire to hide the truth and to lie to the public. Although these facts are unpleasant and terrifying, this is the true situation. For a short period, our future will be even more difficult than the tough times that we have passed. We will face considerable challenges and adversity. However, this

period will not be long. In the coming months, our foreign allies will assist us. They have already pledged their support. Therefore, we will have to patiently bear the next couple of months.However, we can overcome this situation. Doing so will require taking a new path.”

“We must immediately establish a national assembly or political body with the participation of all political parties to find solutions for the present crisis. This will enable us to discuss with all parties and to arrive at decisions for short-, medium-, and long-term action plans that will enable us to rebuild our nation within a specified time frame.”

“We will build a nation without queues for kerosene, gas, and fuel; a nation free of power outages, a nation with plentiful resources where agriculture can freely flourish; a nation where the future of the youth is secure; a nation where people’s labour need not be wasted in queues and in struggles; a nation where everyone can lead their lives freely with three square meals a day.”

“I am undertaking a dangerous challenge. In the Caucasian Chalk Circle, Grusha crossed the broken rope bridge carrying a child that was not her own. This is an even more difficult undertaking. The precipice is deep and its bottom cannot be seen. The bridge is made of thin glass and there is no handrail. I am wearing shoes with sharp nails that cannot be removed. My task is to safely take the child to the other side.”

“I am accepting this challenge for our nation. My goal and dedication is not to save an individual, a family, or a party. My objective is to save all the people of this country and the future of our younger generation. I will undertake this task willingly risking my life if needed and will overcome the challenges facing us. I ask you to extend your support to me in this endeavour.I will fulfill my duty towards our nation.That is my promise to you.”

Ranil  Wickremesinghe has been the target of escalated  insults,jibes, taunts and .invectives after being  appointed premier. These attacks are nothing new to him.It “goes  with the territory” from the time Ranil gained a certain stature in politics. However very few of these attacks are about his ability to repair and revive the economy. Even his vilest critics would grudgingly a=acknowledge that if any one could pull Sri Lanka out of the economic morass it has sunk into, it is Ranil. Indeed that is Wickremesinghe’s unique selling point!

Ranil Wickremesinghe’s flair for providing political leadership for economic revival is  point that  this column has emphasised in the past. “Ranil Wickremesinghe, the UNP Leadership and the TINA Factor” was the heading of an article  written by me  more than eight  years ago. The article published in the  “Daily Mirror”of December 20 2013, was written in the context of the political situation prevailing then.

The all – powerful  President  Mahinda Rajapaksa was seemingly invincible at that time. The chief opposition UNP Leader Ranil Wicremesinghe was perceived by many as a “serial loser” who could not defeat Mahinda.There were some in the UNP who were conspiring to  seize the leadership from Ranil.

My article was  supportive of Ranil and argued then that “there is no alternative”(TINA) to him  as  UNP leader then.I also pointed out that after the war victory euphoria faded away and issues concerning   Sri Lanka’s  economic upliftment  became more important to voters, Ranil Wickremesinghe could be  projected as the better choice. The following excerpts are indicative of what I wrote then –

“Given the triumphalism of majoritarianism  and the perceived popularity of President Rajapakse it may seem virtually impossible that this regime could ever be defeated electorally. But then all things are impermanent and things do change.Political popularity is ephemeral.”

“It must be remembered that Winston Churchill won the war but was booted out in 1945 by Clement Attlee. Indira Gandhi dismembered Pakistan in a military triumph in 1971 but was unceremoniously ejected in 1977 after the emergency.George Bush Sr won the Gulf war but did not get a second term in 1992. George Bush Jnr conquered Kabul and Baghdad but went down at his tail end as the most unpopular US president in history.”

“The Rajapakse regime has contained or diverted resentment against it by using  the war  victory as the opium of the masses. But the war  ended years ago  and it wont be able to justify its shortcomings perpetually through war victory-euphoria. There are misgivings about economic performance.  Charges of nepotism, corruption, repression, authoritarianism , mis-governance and abuse/misuse of power against this regime proliferate.” .

“ Once the euphoria subsides the Country will begin yearning for better economic prospects. Man does not live by  victory on the war front  euphoria alone but also by bread and rice and dhal and sambol. If this regime cannot deliver then people may  welcome change.”

“It is here that Ranil Wickremesinghe could score provided of course that his party would stand by him. He can be projected as the man who could perform an economic miracle. He could also be promoted as the man who would usher in true national unity and unify its people.”

“Wickremesinghe is basically a technocrat and if elected to office would run a smooth and efficient administration. He has a firm grasp of economics and will be the best man to lead the Country on the road to economic emancipation.”

What I wrote then about Ranil being the ideal choice to  spearhead  efforts for the country’s economic upliftment has come true nnow. He has not been elected and is a solitary UNP parliamentarian. Yet he has now donned the leadership mantle in the mission of economic recovery. Ranil like Bertolt Brecht’s Grusha is now carrying the baby across facing fearful odds. Bravo Ranil!

Ranil  Wicremesinghe  was part of the  Junius Richard Jayawardene led  “green elephant”  juggernaut  that swept the general elections of July 21st 1977  winning 141 of the 168 seats then in Parliament. He has been in Parliament continuously since then as an MP except  for a short break from August 2020 to June 2021.  It is an indicator of Ranil’remarkable resilience.No other MP in the present Parliament has as much seniority as  Ranil. Vasudeva Nanayakkara and  Mahinda  Rajapaksa were elected to Parliament before Ranil in 1970. But  they  both lost in 1977 and were not in Parliament for many years.  Rajavarothayam Sampanthan entered Parliament along with Ranil in 1977 but he too suffered breaks in between. Also Sampanthan forfeited his seat in 1983 after refusing to take an oath under the sixth Constitutional Amendment.

The 1977 poll was the last parliamentary election conducted under the old first past the post winner system. Ranil himself  contested and won the newly created Biyagama constituency with a majority of 6769 votes.He polled  22,045. H.A.David Hapangama of the Sri Lanka Freedom Party(SLFP) came second with 15,276 votes.Biyagama was carved out of the  Kelaniya and Mahara electorates in the demarcation of 1976. Ranil’s baptism in politics was as the UNP organizer for Kelaniya in 1975. However when Biyagama electorate came into being , he shifted to the new constituency. It was  UNP strong man Cyril Mathew who  contested Kelaniya and won in 1977.

Forty years is a long time in politics. Wickremesinghe reached a significant milepost in his political journey in 2017  when he completed four decades  of being in Parliament continuously.Starting from 1977, Ranil has weathered parliamentary electoral storms in 1989, 1994, 2000, 2001, 2004, 2010 and 2015 . In 1989 he won from the Gampaha electoral district under the new proportional representation system.Thereafter he was elected to Parliament from Colombo district topping the preference votes among the UNP list of candidates until 2020. Ranil tasted defeat for the first time in 2020.The UNP was trounced at the  August 2020 poll. None of its candidates were elected  including leader Wickremesinghe. But the party was entitled to one nominated MP on the national list. Thus Ranil re  – entered  Parliament as a nominated MP in  June 2021 and has been  for many months  the “lone  elephant”in Parliament.

Ranil  was sworn in as  the new Prime Minister for the sixth time last week. This is a record. Dudley Senanyake was sworn in as PM four times. In the case of Ranil  he has only been a sh premier of short terms.  He first became Prime Minister in May 1994 after  President Ranasinghe  Premadasa was assassinated by the LTTE.Premier DB Wijetunge became President and  Ranil succeeded him as PM.He held office until August 1994. Ranil became Leader of the Opposition from 1994 to 2001.

In  December 2001 Ranil was elected premier  and underwent political cohabitation with President Chandrika  Kumaratunga. She dissolved the UNP-led Govt in 2004  and held fresh elections. The UNP was defeated at the April 2004 elections. Thereafter Ranil was leader of the opposition until 2015.  Ranil holds the “record” for being leader of the opposition for the most number of years.

Maithripala Sirisena  defected from the Rajapaksa Govt and became the presidential candidate of a multiparty coalition headed by the UNP. Sirisena was elected president in January 2015 and appointed Ranil Wickremesinghe s Prime Minister though the UNP had only about 50 seats in Parliament. After the August 2015 Parliamentary poll, Ranil was sworn in as Premier for the fourth time. Though the UNP did not have a clear majority, a  viable Government was formed with the aid of some MP”s from the SLFP.

So Maithripala became President and Ranil the Prime Minister.  Soon  sharp differences –  political as well as personal – began to emerge between both.The “Good Governance” Govt they ushered in lost its  lustre gradually. In one of the worst instances of political  double crossing, Sirisena struck a  deal with Mahinda in October 2018 and appointed him Prime Minister replacing Ranil. After a 52 day political and legal battle Wickremesinghe was restored as Prime Minister again. He was sworn in as Prime Minister for the fifth time in December 2018.

The  Easter Sunday bomb attacks of April 21st 2019 radically transformed the political climate. Former Defence Secretary Gotabaya  Rajapaksa spearheaded the return of Rajapaksas to power by getting elected President on a “Strong man leader for national security”platform. In the Parliamentary elections Sirisen saved his skin by aligning with the Rajapaksa led Sri Lanka Podujana Peramuna(SLPP) and got elected as an MP.

Wickemesinghe however underwent  political difficulties at the hands of his  deputy Sajith Premadasa who formed the Samagi Jana Balavegaya(SJB). Most of the UNP MP’s deserted Ranil. So did the minority party allies of the UNP. The grand old party was routed  at the 2020 election. None of its candidates were elected  including leader Wickremesinghe. But the party was entitled to one seat on the national list and Ranil re  – entered  Parliament as a nominated MP in  June 2021. The lone UNP Parliamentarian was sworn in  a year later as Prime Miniser for the sixth time on May 12th 2022.

Despite his lengthy political career ,Ranil has never been elected President.  However it must  not  be forgotten  that the Presidency was lost by Ranil twice due to the Liberation Tigers of Tamil Eelam (LTTE). In 1999 the abortive assassination attempt   by the tigers on Chandrika Kumaratunge injured her. She lost an eye. This  helped her win by riding the sympathy wave. In 2005 the LTTE prevented Tamils from voting through an enforced boycott. This reduced Wickremesinghe’s potential votes resulting in a narrow margin of defeat.It later became known that Mahinda Rajapaksa had struck a deal with the LTTE in regard to the boycott.

In 2010 and 2015 Ranil  did not contest the presidential elections . He stood down  in favour of Sarath Fonseka and Maithripala Sirisena respectively. In 2019 after protracted political wrangling , Ranil  let the UNP deputy leader Sajith Premadasa contest  the presidential elections. Currently there is much speculation that Ranil Wickremesinghe could become President after a dignified exit by Gotabaya Rajapaksa. That seems a remote possibility at this point of time. However as Doris Day sang in “The man who knew too much” movie  – “Que Sera, Sera, Whatever will be, will be”.

Let me conclude the first part of this article on a personal note. I entered journalism as a trainee reporter on the Tamil daily “Virakesari” in 1977 the  same year that Ranil Wickremesinghe  entered Parliament. My first chance of speaking to Ranil for the first time was after the 77 poll. I uttered just one word  and he responded with two  words. What happened then was this.

When Ranil Wickremesinghe  won for the first time in 1977  there was a lot of excitement among the old hands at “Virakesari”. This was because Ranil’s father Esmond Wickremesinghe had been the chairman of a group of newspapers to which the “Virakesari” also belonged for some years in the late sixties and early seventies of the 20th century. Later Esmond pulled out and the “Virakesari” came under the re-structured Express Newspapers of Ceylon Ltd.

Some of the old timers  at “Virakesari” like veteran photographer Rodrigo would  keep referring to Esmond as “chairman” though Industrialist A.Y. S. Gnanam was the  Express newspapers chairman in 1977. Ranil  was appointed Deputy minister of Foreign Affairs at the age of 28 after being elected MP. One morning when  details of the new ministers and deputy ministers were announced , Rodrigo was on the phone  talking to someone. When I passed by, Roddy  thrust the phone into my hands and said “chairman’s son  Ranil is deputy foreign minister. congratulate him”. So I simply said one word “Congratulations”!. He replied “Thank You”.That was all. I handed the phone back to Rodrigo.

I never got the chance to interact with Ranil Wickremesinghe in my professional capacity as a journalist during the years I was in Sri Lanka. It so happened that the news rounds I covered never brought me into Ranil’s orbit. I did not cover ministries under Wickremesinghe in those days and never got the chance to talk to him.

Even in terms of gathering political news and inside stories,, Ranil Wickremesinghe  was not one of my  ministerial sources in the JRJ cabinet. I relied on ministers like Lalith Athulathmudali, Gamini Dissanayake, Anandatissa de Alwis, E.L. Senanayake, Saumiyamoorthy Thondaman, A. C. S. Hameed, K. W. Devanayagam ,,Gamani Jayasuriya and Festus Perera for that.

In my case the only occasion I interacted with Wickremesinghe “socially” was in 1985 during the time of Margaret Thatcher’s visit to Sri Lanka. Former “Sunday Leader” editor Lasantha Wickrematunge and I were working at “The Island” at that time and were in Kandy to cover her visit.

Ranil Wickremesinghe, Education and Youth Affairs minister at that time invited us for dinner. I found him to be a genial conversationalist and amiable personality. He was well-read and well-informed. Though I cannot remember the details of he conversation now, I do recall being immensely impressed by his  vast knowledge of men and matters.

We joked  much and laughed  lot.I remember that when the band came around, Ranil picked “Kandy Lamissi” by Mariazelle, to be played. He was a bachelor then and we teased him about who his “menike” was. He took it good-humouredly. It was a very pleasant evening.

I left Sri Lanka in 1988. While writing to “The Sundy Leader” from Canada I got to know  about Ranil’s views on certain issues  – like the Oslo-facilitated peace process – through Lasantha. I did not interact with Ranil directly.

In Dec 2013 I wrote an  article  in the “Daily Mirror” that I have referred to in this article  earlier. Ranil telephoned me from Colombo and thanked me for it. In 2014 , I wrote an article titled “LTTE- enforced boycott lost Ranil the presidency in 2005”.It was published in the “Daily Mirror” of October 24th 2014. Again the UNP Leader Wickremesinghe telephoned me directly and thanked me.

In that article I had  explained in detail about  how and why the LTTE  wanted  Ranil’s defeat. I later heard from UNP sources that  copies of the article had been distributed widely at “Srikotha” then.. I was also told that Ranil Wickremesinghe had mentioned my name and the  article  at a public meeting.  He reportedly  told the audience to read  DBS Jeyaraj’s article to know the truth about the 2005 Presidential election.
This article was published in the “D.B.S.Jeyaraj Column” of the “Daily Mirror”on May 21st 2022. It can be accessed here:

si.title: රනිල් පුනරාගමනය: අගමැති වික්‍රමසිංහගේ කැපී පෙනෙන ඔරොත්තු දීමේ හැකියාව
body_lines: රනිල් නමින් හඳුන්වන රනිල් ශ්‍රියාන් වික්‍රමසිංහ හයවැනි වරටත් ශ්‍රී ලංකාවේ අගමැති ලෙස යළිත් බලයේ අසුන් ගනී. නව අග්‍රාමාත්‍යවරයා මහමැතිවරණයකින් ජනතාව විසින් පත් කර හෝ පාර්ලිමේන්තුවේ බහුතර මන්ත්‍රීවරුන් විසින් අනුමත කරනු ලැබුවේ නැත. පසුගිය පාර්ලිමේන්තු මැතිවරණයෙන් අන්ත පරාජයට පත් වූ එක්සත් ජාතික පක්ෂයේ නායකයා රනිල්ය. ඔහු තමයි දැන් පාර්ලිමේන්තුවේ එක්සත් ජාතික පක්ෂයේ එකම නියෝජිතයා. හුදකලා මන්ත්‍රීවරයාගේ සිට නව අගමැති දක්වා ඔහුගේ ධූරයේ වැඩ භාරගැනීම පිළිබඳව ඇතැම් පුවත්පත් විස්තර කළේ මෙලෙසිනි.

රනිල් ධූරයට පත් වූයේ ඉතා සුවිශේෂී තත්ත්වයන් හරහාය. අසාර්ථක බංකොලොත් රාජ්‍යයක අගමැති ලෙස ඔහු බලවත් අභියෝගවලට මුහුණ දෙයි. රනිල් වික්‍රමසිංහ මහතා අග්‍රාමාත්‍ය ධූරයට පත්වීමේ ප්‍රතිවිපාක, වත්මන් දේශපාලන පරිසරයේ සංකීර්ණතා සහ අනාගතයේදී පාර්ලිමේන්තුවේ ක්‍රීඩා කිරීමේ ස්වභාවය මෙම ලිපියේ දෙවන කොටසින් වඩාත් විස්තරාත්මකව විමසා බලනු ඇත.

දැනට මම 2022 මැයි 16 වැනි දින අගමැති රනිල් වික්‍රමසිංහ මහතා විසින් කරන ලද විශේෂ ප්‍රකාශයෙන් ආශ්වාදජනක ඡේද කිහිපයක් උපුටා දක්වමි. ශ්‍රී ලංකාවේ ආර්ථිකයේ භයානක තත්ත්වය පිළිබඳව රනිල් සත්‍යය හෙළිදරව් කළ අතර එය නැවත නැඟිටුවීමේ උත්සාහයේ අභියෝගය භාරගෙන ඇත. මේ සඳහා තමාට සහයෝගය දෙන ලෙස ඔහු සියලු දෙනාගෙන් ඉල්ලා සිටියේය. මෙන්න අදාළ ඡේද-:

“පසුගිය බ්‍රහස්පතින්දා මම අගමැති ධූරය භාර ගත්තා. මම මේ තනතුර ඉල්ලුවේ නැහැ. රට මුහුණ දී තිබෙන අභියෝගාත්මක තත්ත්වය හමුවේ ජනාධිපතිතුමා මට ආරාධනා කළා මේ තනතුර භාර ගන්න කියලා. දේශපාලන නායකයෙකු ලෙස පමණක් නොව කොළඹ විශ්වවිද්‍යාලයේ නීති පීඨයේ නිදහස් අධ්‍යාපනයෙන් ප්‍රතිලාභ ලැබූ ජාතික නායකයෙකු ලෙසද මා මෙම වගකීම භාර ගත්තා.”
“ඉදිරි මාස දෙක අපේ ජීවිතයේ දුෂ්කරම මාස දෙක වනු ඇත. යම් කැපකිරීම් කිරීමට සහ මෙම කාල පරිච්ඡේදයේ අභියෝගවලට මුහුණ දීමට අප සූදානම් විය යුතුය.

“සත්‍යය වසන් කිරීමට සහ මහජනතාවට බොරු කීමට මට කිසිම උවමනාවක් නැත. මෙම කරුණු අමිහිරි සහ බිය උපදවන සුළු වුවද සැබෑ තත්ත්වය මෙයයි. කෙටි කාලයක් සඳහා, අපගේ අනාගතය අප ගෙවී ගිය දුෂ්කර කාලවලට වඩා දුෂ්කර වනු ඇත. අපි සැලකිය යුතු අභියෝග සහ විපත්තිවලට මුහුණ දෙන්නෙමු. කෙසේ වෙතත්, මෙම

කාලය දිගු නොවනු ඇත. ඉදිරි මාසවලදී අපගේ විදේශීය මිතුරන් අපට සහාය වනු ඇත. ඔවුන් දැනටමත් ඔවුන්ගේ සහයෝගය ලබා දීමට පොරොන්දු වී ඇත. ඒ නිසා ඉදිරි මාස දෙක අපිට ඉවසීමෙන් විඳදරාගන්න වෙනවා.කෙසේ වෙතත් අපිට මේ තත්ත්වයෙන් ගොඩ එන්න පුළුවන්. එසේ කිරීමට නව මාවතකට යාමට සිදු වනු ඇත.

“වර්තමාන අර්බුදයට විසඳුම් සෙවීම සඳහා අපි සියලු දේශපාලන පක්ෂවල සහභාගීත්වයෙන් ජාතික සභාවක් හෝ දේශපාලන මණ්ඩලයක් වහාම ස්ථාපිත කළ යුතුයි. මෙමගින් සියලු පාර්ශ්ව සමඟ සාකච්ඡා කිරීමටත්, නිශ්චිත කාල රාමුවක් තුළ අපගේ ජාතිය යළි ගොඩනැගීමට හැකි වන පරිදි කෙටි, මධ්‍ය කාලීන සහ දිගුකාලීන ක්‍රියාකාරී සැලසුම් සඳහා තීරණ ගැනීමටත් අපට හැකි වේ.

“භූමිතෙල්, ගෑස් සහ ඉන්ධන සඳහා පෝලිම් නැති ජාතියක් අපි ගොඩනඟමු; විදුලිය ඇනහිටීම්වලින් තොර ජාතියක්, කෘෂිකර්මාන්තය නිදහසේ දියුණු විය හැකි සම්පත් බහුල ජාතියක්; තරුණයන්ගේ අනාගතය සුරක්ෂිත ජාතියක්; මිනිසුන්ගේ ශ්‍රමය පෝලිම්වල හා අරගලවල අපතේ නොයැවිය යුතු ජාතියක්; සෑම කෙනෙකුටම දිනකට වර්ග ආහාර වේල් තුනකින් නිදහසේ තම ජීවිතය ගත කළ හැකි ජාතියක්.

“මම භයානක අභියෝගයක් භාර ගන්නවා. කොකේසියානු හුණු කවයේ දී, ගෲෂා තමාගේම නොවන දරුවෙකු රැගෙන කැඩුණු කඹ පාලම තරණය කළාය. මෙය ඊටත් වඩා දුෂ්කර කාර්යයකි. ප්‍රපාතය ගැඹුරු වන අතර එහි පතුල නොපෙනේ. පාලම තුනී වීදුරු වලින් සාදා ඇති අතර අත් වැටක් නොමැත. ගලවන්න බැරි තියුණු නිය ඇති සපත්තු දාගෙන ඉන්නේ. මගේ කාර්යය වන්නේ දරුවා ආරක්ෂිතව අනෙක් පැත්තට ගෙන යාමයි.

“මම අපේ ජාතිය වෙනුවෙන් මේ අභියෝගය භාර ගන්නවා. මගේ අරමුණ සහ කැපවීම පුද්ගලයෙකු, පවුලක් හෝ පක්ෂයක් බේරා ගැනීම නොවේ. මගේ අරමුණ මේ රටේ සියලුම ජනතාව සහ අපේ තරුණ පරම්පරාවේ අනාගතය බේරා ගැනීමයි. අවශ්‍ය නම් මගේ ජීවිතය පරදුවට තබමින් මම මේ කර්තව්‍යය භාරගෙන අපි මුහුණ දෙන අභියෝග ජයගන්නවා. මෙම ප්‍රයත්නයට ඔබගේ සහයෝගය ලබා දෙන මෙන් මම ඔබෙන් ඉල්ලා සිටිමි. මම අපේ ජාතිය වෙනුවෙන් මගේ යුතුකම ඉටු කරමි. එය මා ඔබට දුන් පොරොන්දුවයි.

රනිල් වික්‍රමසිංහ මහතා අග්‍රාමාත්‍ය ධුරයට පත්වීමෙන් පසු වැඩි වූ අපහාස, උපහාස, උපහාස සහ . මෙම ප්‍රහාර ඔහුට අලුත් දෙයක් නොවේ.එය "භූමිය සමඟ යයි" රනිල් දේශපාලනයේ යම් ස්ථාවරයක් ලබා ගත් දා සිට. කෙසේ වෙතත්, මෙම ප්‍රහාරවලින් ඉතා ස්වල්පයක් ආර්ථිකය අලුත්වැඩියා කිරීමට සහ පුනර්ජීවනය කිරීමට ඔහුට ඇති හැකියාව ගැන ය. ශ්‍රී ලංකාව ගිලී ඇති ආර්ථික අගාධයෙන් කිසිවකුට ගොඩ ගත හැකි නම් ඒ රනිල් බව ඔහුගේ තුච්ඡ විවේචකයන් පවා නොමනාපව පිළිගනු ඇත. ඇත්ත වශයෙන්ම එය වික්‍රමසිංහගේ අද්විතීය විකුණුම් ස්ථානයයි!

ආර්ථික පුනර්ජීවනය සඳහා දේශපාලන නායකත්වය සැපයීමේ රනිල් වික්‍රමසිංහගේ දක්‍ෂතාවය මෙම තීරුවෙන් අතීතයේ දී අවධාරණය කළ කරුණකි. “රනිල් වික්‍රමසිංහ, එජාප නායකත්වය සහ ටීනා සාධකය” යනු මීට වසර අටකට පෙර මා විසින් ලියන ලද ලිපියක ශීර්ෂය විය. 2013 දෙසැම්බර් 20 වැනි දින “ඩේලි මිරර්” පුවත්පතේ පළ වූ ලිපිය එවකට පැවති දේශපාලන වාතාවරණය පසුබිම් කරගෙන ලියන ලද්දකි.

සර්වබලධාරී ජනාධිපති මහින්ද රාජපක්‍ෂ මහතා ඒ වන විට අපරාජිතව සිටියේය. ප්‍රධාන විපක්ෂයේ එජාප නායක රනිල් වික්‍රමසිංහ බොහෝ දෙනාට හැඟී ගියේ මහින්ද පරාජය කළ නොහැකි "අනුක්‍රමික පරාජිතයෙකු" ලෙසය. රනිල්ගෙන් නායකත්වය ඩැහැගැනීමට කුමන්ත්‍රණ කරන පිරිසක් එජාපයේද සිටියහ.

මගේ ලිපිය රනිල්ට සහය වූ අතර එවකට එජාප නායකයා ලෙස ඔහුට “වෙනසක් නැත” (ටීනා) තර්ක කළේය. යුද ජයග්‍රහණයෙන් පසුව ශ්‍රී ලංකාවේ ආර්ථික උන්නතිය පිළිබඳ ප්‍රශ්න ඡන්දදායකයින්ට වඩාත් වැදගත් වූ බවත් මම පෙන්වා දුන්නෙමි. , රනිල් වික්‍රමසිංහ වඩා හොඳ තේරීමක් ලෙස ප්‍රක්ෂේපණය කළ හැකිය. පහත උපුටා දැක්වීම් මා එදා ලියූ දේ පෙන්නුම් කරයි -

“බහුතරවාදයේ ජයග්‍රාහීත්වය සහ ජනාධිපති රාජපක්ෂගේ ජනපි‍්‍රය බව සලකන විට මෙම පාලනය කිසිදා මැතිවරණ වශයෙන් පරාජය කළ නොහැකි බව පෙනෙන්නට තිබේ. නමුත් එවිට සියලු දේ අනිත්‍යයි, දේවල් වෙනස් වෙනවා. දේශපාලන ජනප්‍රියත්වය අනිත්‍යයි.”

“වින්ස්ටන් චර්චිල් යුද්ධය ජයග්‍රහණය කළ නමුත් 1945 දී ක්ලෙමන්ට් ඇට්ලි විසින් බූට් කරන ලද බව මතක තබා ගත යුතුය. ඉන්දිරා ගාන්ධි 1971 දී හමුදා ජයග්‍රහණයකින් පකිස්තානය කොටස් කළ නමුත් හදිසි අවස්ථාවෙන් පසු 1977 දී අවිධිමත් ලෙස නෙරපා හරින ලදී. ජෝර්ජ් බුෂ් ජ්‍යෙෂ්ඨ ගල්ෆ් යුද්ධය ජයග්‍රහණය කළ නමුත් 1992 දී දෙවන ධූර කාලය ලබා ගත්තේ නැත. ජෝර්ජ් බුෂ් ජූනියර් කාබුල් සහ බැග්ඩෑඩ් යටත් කර ගත් නමුත් ඔහුගේ වලිගයෙන් බැස ගියේය. ඉතිහාසයේ වඩාත්ම ජනප්‍රිය නොවන එක්සත් ජනපද ජනාධිපතිවරයා ලෙස අවසන් වේ.

“යුද ජයග්‍රහණය මහජනතාවගේ අබිං ලෙස යොදා ගනිමින් රාජපක්ෂ පාලනය ඊට එරෙහි අමනාපය පාලනය කර හෝ වෙනතකට යොමු කර ඇත. නමුත් යුද්ධය වසර ගණනාවකට පෙර අවසන් වූ අතර යුද ජයග්‍රහණ-ප්‍රීතිය හරහා එහි අඩුපාඩු සදාකාලිකව සාධාරණීකරණය කිරීමට එයට නොහැකි වනු ඇත. ආර්ථික කාර්ය සාධනය පිළිබඳ සැකයන් පවතී. මෙම පාලනයට එරෙහිව ඥාති සංග්‍රහය, දූෂණය, මර්දනය, අධිකාරීවාදය, වැරදි පාලනය සහ බලය අනිසි ලෙස භාවිතා කිරීම/අයුතු ලෙස පරිහරණය කිරීම යන චෝදනා පැතිර යයි. .

“ප්‍රීතිය පහව ගිය පසු රට වඩා හොඳ ආර්ථික අපේක්ෂාවන් සඳහා ආශා කිරීමට පටන් ගනී. මිනිසා ජීවත් වන්නේ යුද පෙරමුණේ ජයග්‍රහණයෙන් පමණක් නොව පාන්, බත්, පරිප්පු, සම්බෝල ආදියෙනි. මෙම පාලනයට ලබා දිය නොහැකි නම්, ජනතාව වෙනස්කම් පිළිගනු ඇත.

“රනිල් වික්‍රමසිංහට ලකුණු ගන්න පුළුවන් වෙන්නේ මෙතැනදී තමයි ඔහුගේ පක්ෂය ඔහු වෙනුවෙන් පෙනී සිටින බව. ඔහු ආර්ථික ආශ්චර්යයක් කළ හැකි මිනිසා ලෙස ප්‍රක්ෂේපණය කළ හැකිය. සැබෑ ජාතික සමගිය ඇති කරන සහ එහි ජනතාව එක්සත් කරන මිනිසා ලෙසද ඔහු උසස් කළ හැකිය.

“වික්‍රමසිංහ මහතා මූලික වශයෙන් තාක්ෂණවේදියෙක් වන අතර ඔහු තනතුරට තේරී පත් වුවහොත් සුමට හා කාර්යක්ෂම පරිපාලනයක් ගෙන යනු ඇත. ඔහු ආර්ථික විද්‍යාව පිළිබඳ දැඩි අවබෝධයක් ඇති අතර රට ආර්ථික විමුක්තිය කරා යන මාවතට ගෙන යාමට හොඳම මිනිසා වනු ඇත.

රටේ ආර්ථිකය නගා සිටුවීමේ ප්‍රයත්නයන්ට නායකත්වය දීමට සුදුසුම තේරීම රනිල් යැයි මා එදා ලියූ දේ දැන් සැබෑ වී ඇත. ඔහු තේරී පත්වී නැති අතර හුදකලා එජාප පාර්ලිමේන්තු මන්ත්‍රීවරයෙකි. එහෙත් ඔහු දැන් ආර්ථික ප්‍රකෘතිමත් කිරීමේ මෙහෙයුමේ නායකත්ව සළුව පැළඳ සිටී. බර්ටෝල්ට් බ්‍රෙෂ්ට්ගේ ගෲෂා මෙන් රනිල්ද දැන් බබාව වඩාගෙන සිටින්නේ භයානක ප්‍රශ්නවලට මුහුණ දෙමිනි. බ්‍රාවෝ රනිල්!

රනිල් වික්‍රමසිංහ යනු 1977 ජූලි 21 මහ මැතිවරණයෙන් එවකට පාර්ලිමේන්තුවේ ආසන 168 න් 141 ක් දිනා ගනිමින් ජූනියස් රිචඩ් ජයවර්ධනගේ නායකත්වයෙන් යුත් “කොළ අලි” ජෝඩුවේ කොටසකි. 2020 අගෝස්තුවේ සිට 2021 ජූනි දක්වා කෙටි විරාමයක් හැරුණු විට ඔහු මන්ත්‍රීවරයකු ලෙස එතැන් සිට අඛණ්ඩව පාර්ලිමේන්තුවේ සිටියේය. එය රනිල්ගේ කැපී පෙනෙන ඔරොත්තු දීමේ දර්ශකයකි. රනිල් තරම් ජ්‍යෙෂ්ඨත්වය වත්මන් පාර්ලිමේන්තුවේ වෙනත් කිසිදු මන්ත්‍රීවරයකුට නැත. 1970 රනිල්ට කලින් වාසුදේව නානායක්කාරයි මහින්ද රාජපක්ෂයි පාර්ලිමේන්තුවට තේරී පත්වුණා.ඒත් ඒ දෙන්නම 1977 පැරදිලා අවුරුදු ගාණක් පාර්ලිමේන්තුවේ හිටියේ නැහැ. රාජවරෝතයම් සම්බන්ධන් 1977 දී රනිල් සමඟ පාර්ලිමේන්තුවට පැමිණියද ඔහුද අතරමගදී බිඳවැටීම්වලට ලක්විය. එසේම 1983 දී හයවන ආණ්ඩුක්‍රම ව්‍යවස්ථා සංශෝධනය යටතේ දිවුරුම් දීම ප්‍රතික්ෂේප කිරීමෙන් සම්බන්ධන් මහතාට ඔහුගේ මන්ත්‍රී ධුරය අහිමි විය.

1977 ඡන්ද විමසීම පැරණි පළමු පසු ජයග්‍රාහක ක්‍රමය යටතේ පවත්වන ලද අවසන් පාර්ලිමේන්තු මැතිවරණයයි. වැඩි ඡන්ද 6769කින් අලුතින් නිර්මාණය වූ බියගම ආසනයට රනිල්ම තරග කර ජයග්‍රහණය කළේය. ඔහු ලබා ගත් සංඛ්‍යාව 22,045කි. ශ්‍රී ලංකා නිදහස් පක්ෂයේ (ශ්‍රීලනිප) එච්.ඒ.ඩේවිඩ් හපන්ගම ඡන්ද 15,276ක් ලබා ගනිමින් දෙවැනි ස්ථානයට පත්විය. බියගම 1976 සීමා නිර්ණය කිරීමේදී කැලණිය සහ මහර මැතිවරණ කොට්ඨාසවලින් කැටයම් කරන ලදී. රනිල්ගේ දේශපාලනය බව්තීස්ම වූයේ 1975 වන විට කැලණිය එජාප සංවිධායකවරයා ලෙසය. බියගම මැතිවරණ කොට්ඨාශය ඇති වූ අතර ඔහු නව ආසනයට මාරු විය. 1977 කැලණියට තරග කරලා ජයග්‍රහණය කළේ එජාපයේ ප්‍රබලයෙකු වූ සිරිල් මැතිව්ය.

අවුරුදු හතළිහක් කියන්නේ දේශපාලනයේ දීර්ඝ කාලයක්. 2017 දී වික්‍රමසිංහ සිය දේශපාලන ගමනේ සුවිශේෂී සන්ධිස්ථානයකට පැමිණියේ ඔහු අඛණ්ඩව පාර්ලිමේන්තුවේ දශක හතරක් සම්පූර්ණ කළ අවස්ථාවේදීය. 1989 නව සමානුපාතික නියෝජන ක්‍රමය යටතේ ගම්පහ මැතිවරණ දිස්ත්‍රික්කයෙන් ජයග්‍රහණය කළේය.ඉන්පසු 2020 දක්වා එජාප අපේක්ෂක ලැයිස්තුවේ මනාපයෙන් කොළඹ දිස්ත්‍රික්කයෙන් පාර්ලිමේන්තුවට තේරී පත් විය.රනිල් ප්‍රථම වරට 2020දී පරාජයේ රස වින්දේය. 2020 අගෝස්තු මැතිවරණයේදී පරාජයට පත් විය. නායක වික්‍රමසිංහ ඇතුළු එහි කිසිදු අපේක්ෂකයකු තේරී පත් වූයේ නැත. එහෙත් ජාතික ලැයිස්තුවේ එක් නම් කළ මන්ත්‍රීවරයකුට එම පක්ෂයට හිමිවිය. මේ අනුව 2021 ජූනි මාසයේදී නම් කළ මන්ත්‍රීවරයකු ලෙස රනිල් යළි පාර්ලිමේන්තුවට පැමිණ මාස ගණනාවක් පාර්ලිමේන්තුවේ “තනි අලියා” ලෙස සිටියේය.

සයවැනි වරටත් නව අගමැති ලෙස රනිල් පසුගිය සතියේ දිවුරුම් දුන්නේය. මෙය වාර්තාවකි. ඩඩ්ලි සේනානායක මහතා සිව් වතාවක් අගමැති ලෙස දිවුරුම් දුන්නේය. රනිල් සම්බන්ධයෙන් නම් ඔහු කෙටි කාලීන අගමැතිවරයෙක් පමණයි. 1994 මැයි මාසයේදී රණසිංහ ප්‍රේමදාස ජනාධිපතිවරයා එල්ටීටීඊය විසින් ඝාතනය කිරීමෙන් පසු ඔහු ප්‍රථම වරට අගමැති විය. අගමැති ඩී.බී. විජේතුංග ජනාධිපති වූ අතර ඔහුගෙන් පසු රනිල් අගමැති විය. ඔහු 1994 අගෝස්තු දක්වා ධූරය දැරීය. 1994 සිට 2001 දක්වා රනිල් විපක්ෂ නායක විය.

2001 දෙසැම්බරයේදී රනිල් අගමැති ලෙස තේරී පත් වූ අතර චන්ද්‍රිකා කුමාරතුංග ජනාධිපතිනිය සමඟ දේශපාලන සහජීවනයට පත් විය. ඇය 2004 දී එක්සත් ජාතික පක්ෂය ප්‍රමුඛ රජය විසුරුවා හැර නැවත මැතිවරණයක් පැවැත්වූවාය. 2004 අප්‍රේල් මැතිවරණයෙන් එජාපය පරාජයට පත් විය. ඉන් පසුව 2015 වනතුරු රනිල් විපක්ෂ නායකයා විය. වැඩිම වසර ගණනක් විපක්ෂ නායක ධූරය දැරූ “වාර්තාව” රනිල් සතුය.

මෛත්‍රීපාල සිරිසේන රාජපක්ෂ ආණ්ඩුවෙන් ඉවත් වී එජාපය ප්‍රමුඛ බහු පක්ෂ හවුලක ජනාධිපති අපේක්ෂකයා බවට පත් විය. සිරිසේන 2015 ජනවාරි මාසයේදී ජනාධිපති ලෙස තේරී පත් වූ අතර එක්සත් ජාතික පක්ෂයට පාර්ලිමේන්තුවේ ආසන 50ක් පමණ තිබුණද රනිල් වික්‍රමසිංහ අගමැති ලෙස පත් කළේය. 2015 අගෝස්තු පාර්ලිමේන්තු මැතිවරණයෙන් පසු රනිල් සිව්වැනි වරටත් අගමැති ලෙස දිවුරුම් දුන්නේය. එජාපයට පැහැදිලි බහුතර බලයක් නොතිබුණත් ශ්‍රීලනිපයේ මන්ත්‍රීවරුන් කිහිප දෙනෙකුගේ සහයෝගයෙන් ශක්‍ය ආණ්ඩුවක් පිහිටුවන ලදී.

ඉතින් මෛත්‍රීපාල ජනාධිපති වෙලා රනිල් අගමැති වුණා. වැඩි කල් නොගොස් තියුනු මතභේද - දේශපාලනික මෙන්ම පුද්ගලිකද - මේ දෙක අතර මතුවෙන්නට පටන් ගත්තේය. ඔවුන් ගෙන ආ "යහපාලන" ආණ්ඩුවේ දීප්තිය ක්‍රමයෙන් නැති විය. දේශපාලන ද්විත්ව හරස්වීම්වල නරකම අවස්ථාවක, සිරිසේන 2018 ඔක්තෝම්බර් මාසයේදී මහින්ද සමඟ ඩීල් දමා රනිල් වෙනුවට ඔහුව අගමැති ලෙස පත් කළේය. දින 52ක දේශපාලන හා නීතිමය සටනකින් පසු නැවතත් වික්‍රමසිංහ මහතා අගමැති ධුරයට පත් විය. ඔහු 2018 දෙසැම්බර් මාසයේදී පස්වන වරටත් අග්‍රාමාත්‍යවරයා ලෙස දිවුරුම් දුන්නේය.

2019 අප්‍රේල් 21 පාස්කු ඉරිදා බෝම්බ ප්‍රහාරය දේශපාලන වාතාවරණය රැඩිකල් ලෙස පරිවර්තනය කළේය. හිටපු ආරක්‍ෂක ලේකම් ගෝඨාභය රාජපක්‍ෂ මහතා “ජාතික ආරක්‍ෂාව සඳහා ශක්තිමත් නායකයෙක්‌” වේදිකාවක්‌ මත ජනාධිපති ලෙස තේරී පත්වෙමින් රාජපක්‍ෂවරුන් නැවත බලයට ගෙන ඒමට නායකත්වය දුන්නේය. පාර්ලිමේන්තු මැතිවරණයේදී සිරිසේන මහතා රාජපක්ෂ ප්‍රමුඛ ශ්‍රී ලංකා පොදුජන පෙරමුණ (SLPP) සමඟ සන්ධානගත වී මන්ත්‍රීවරයෙකු ලෙස තේරී පත් විය.

කෙසේ වෙතත් සමගි ජනබලවේගය (SJB) පිහිටුවා ගත් ඔහුගේ නියෝජ්‍ය සජිත් ප්‍රේමදාස අතින් වික්‍රමසිංහ දේශපාලන දුෂ්කරතාවලට මුහුණ දුන්නේය. UNP මන්ත්‍රීවරුන්ගෙන් වැඩි දෙනෙක් රනිල්ව දාලා. එ.ජා.ප.යේ සුළු ජාතික පක්‍ෂ හිතවතුන්ද එසේමය. මහා පැරණි පක්ෂය 2020 මැතිවරණයේදී පරාජයට පත් විය. නායක වික්‍රමසිංහ ඇතුළු එහි කිසිදු අපේක්ෂකයකු තේරී පත් වූයේ නැත. එහෙත් එම පක්ෂයට ජාතික ලැයිස්තුවෙන් එක් මන්ත්‍රී ධූරයක් හිමි වූ අතර 2021 ජූනි මාසයේදී රනිල් නැවත නම් කරන ලද මන්ත්‍රීවරයෙකු ලෙස පාර්ලිමේන්තුවට පිවිසියේය. වසරකට පසුව 2022 මැයි 12 වැනි දින හයවැනි වරටත් අගමැති ලෙස දිවුරුම් දුන්නේ එකම එජාප පාර්ලිමේන්තු මන්ත්‍රීවරයාය.

දීර්ඝ දේශපාලන ජීවිතයක් ගත කළත් රනිල් කිසි දිනක ජනාධිපති ධූරයට පත්වී නැත. කෙසේ වෙතත්, දෙමළ ඊළාම් විමුක්ති කොටි සංවිධානය (එල්ටීටීඊ) නිසා දෙවරක්ම ජනාධිපතිකම රනිල්ට අහිමි වූ බව අමතක නොකළ යුතුය. 1999 දී චන්ද්‍රිකා කුමාරතුංග මහත්මියට කොටි ඝාතන තැත ගබ්සා කළා. ඇයට ඇසක් අහිමි විය. මෙය ඇයට අනුකම්පා රැල්ල පැදවීමෙන් ජයග්‍රහණය කිරීමට උපකාරී විය. 2005 දී එල්ටීටීඊය බලහත්කාර වර්ජනයක් මගින් දෙමළ ජනයාට ඡන්දය දීම වැළැක්වීය. මෙමගින් වික්‍රමසිංහගේ විභව ඡන්ද ප්‍රමාණය අඩු වූ අතර එහි ප්‍රතිඵලයක් ලෙස සුළු පරාජයක් ඇති විය. මහින්ද රාජපක්ෂ වර්ජනය සම්බන්ධයෙන් එල්ටීටීඊය සමඟ ඩීල් එකක් දමා ඇති බව පසුව දැනගන්නට ලැබුණි.

2010 සහ 2015 රනිල් ජනාධිපතිවරණයට ඉදිරිපත් වුණේ නැහැ. ඔහු පිළිවෙලින් සරත් ෆොන්සේකාට සහ මෛත්‍රීපාල සිරිසේනට පක්ෂව නැගී සිටියේය. 2019 දී දිග්ගැස්සුනු දේශපාලන පොරබැදීමකින් පසු රනිල් එජාප නියෝජ්‍ය නායක සජිත් ප්‍රේමදාස මහතාට ජනාධිපතිවරණයට ඉදිරිපත් කිරීමට ඉඩ දුන්නේය. ගෝඨාභය රාජපක්ෂ මහතාගේ ගෞරවනීය ඉවත්වීමෙන් පසු රනිල් වික්‍රමසිංහ මහතා ජනාධිපති විය හැකි බවට මේ වන විට බොහෝ මත පළවෙමින් තිබේ. එය මේ මොහොතේ දුරස්ථ හැකියාවක් ලෙස පෙනේ. කෙසේ වෙතත්, ඩොරිස් ඩේ ගායනා කළ පරිදි “ඕනෑවට වඩා දැන සිටි මිනිසා” චිත්‍රපටයේ - “ක්වි සේරා, සේරා, කුමක් වුවත්, වනු ඇත”.

මෙම ලිපියේ පළමු කොටස පුද්ගලික සටහනකින් අවසන් කරමි. 1977 දී රනිල් වික්‍රමසිංහ මහතා පාර්ලිමේන්තුවට පැමිණි වසරේම “විරකේසරි” දෙමළ දිනපතා පුවත්පතේ අභ්‍යාසලාභී වාර්තාකරුවෙකු ලෙස මම පුවත්පත් කලාවට පිවිසිමි. මට පළමු වතාවට රනිල්ට කතා කරන්න අවස්ථාව ලැබුණේ 77 ඡන්දයෙන් පසුවයි. මම එක වචනයක් පමණක් කී අතර ඔහු වචන දෙකකින් පිළිතුරු දුන්නේය. එවිට සිදුවූයේ මෙයයි.

1977 රනිල් වික්‍රමසිංහ ප්‍රථම වරට ජයග්‍රහණය කරන විට “විරකේසරී” හිදී පැරැණි දෑත් අතර මහත් උද්යෝගයක් ඇති විය. මක්නිසාද යත් රනිල්ගේ පියා එස්මන්ඩ් වික්‍රමසිංහ 20 වැනි සියවසේ හැටේ දශකයේ අගභාගයේ සහ හැත්තෑව දශකයේ මුල් භාගයේ “විරකේසරි” පුවත්පතද අයත් වූ පුවත්පත් සමූහයක සභාපතිවරයා ලෙස කටයුතු කර තිබීමයි. පසුව එස්මන්ඩ් ඉවත් වූ අතර “විරකේසරි” ප්‍රතිව්‍යුහගත කරන ලද එක්ස්ප්‍රස් පුවත්පත් ඔෆ් සිලෝන් ලිමිටඩ් යටතට පත් විය.

ප්‍රවීණ ඡායාරූප ශිල්පී රොද්‍රිගෝ වැනි “විරකේසරි” හි සමහර පැරණි ටයිමර්වරු එස්මන්ඩ්ව “සභාපති” ලෙස දිගටම හඳුන්වති, නමුත් කාර්මික A.Y. එස්.ඥානම් මහතා 1977 එක්ස්ප්‍රස් පුවත්පත් සභාපතිවරයා විය. රනිල් මන්ත්‍රීවරයා ලෙස තේරී පත්වී වයස අවුරුදු 28 දී විදේශ කටයුතු නියෝජ්‍ය අමාත්‍යවරයා ලෙස පත් විය. දිනක් උදෑසන නව ඇමතිවරුන් සහ නියෝජ්‍ය අමාත්‍යවරුන් පිළිබඳ තොරතුරු ප්‍රකාශ කරන විට රුද්‍රිගු දුරකථනයෙන් කා සමඟ හෝ කතා කරමින් සිටියේය. මම ඒ අසලින් යන විට රොඩී දුරකථනය මගේ අතට දී “සභාපතිගේ පුතා රනිල් නියෝජ්‍ය විදේශ ඇමති. ඔහුට සුබ පතන්න." ඉතින් මම සරලව එක වචනයක් කිව්වා "සුභ පැතුම්"!. ඔහු පිළිතුරු දුන්නේ "ස්තූතියි".එපමණයි. මම දුරකථනය නැවත රුද්‍රිගුට දුන්නෙමි.

මා ශ්‍රී ලංකාවේ සිටි කාලය තුළ මාධ්‍යවේදියෙකු ලෙස මගේ වෘත්තීය මට්ටමින් රනිල් වික්‍රමසිංහ සමඟ සම්බන්ධ වීමට මට කිසිදා අවස්ථාවක් නොලැබුණි. එය එසේ වූයේ මා විසින් ආවරණය කරන ලද ප්‍රවෘත්ති වට මාව රනිල්ගේ කක්ෂයට ගෙනාවේ නැත. මම ඒ දවස්වල වික්‍රමසිංහ යටතේ අමාත්‍යාංශ ආවරණය කළේ නැහැ, ඔහු සමඟ කතා කරන්න අවස්ථාවක් ලැබුණේ නැහැ.

දේශපාලන ප්‍රවෘත්ති සහ අභ්‍යන්තර කතා එකතු කිරීමේදී පවා, රනිල් වික්‍රමසිංහ JRJ කැබිනට් මණ්ඩලයේ මගේ අමාත්‍ය මූලාශ්‍රවලින් එකක් නොවීය. මම විශ්වාසය තැබුවේ ලලිත් ඇතුලත්මුදලි, ගාමිණී දිසානායක, ආනන්දතිස්ස ද අල්විස්, ඊ.එල්. ඒ සඳහා සේනානායක, සෞමියමූර්ති තොණ්ඩමන්, A. C. S. හමීඩ්, K. W. දේවනායගම්,, ගාමණී ජයසූරිය සහ ෆෙස්ටස් පෙරේරා.

මා සම්බන්ධයෙන් ගත් කල, මම වික්‍රමසිංහ සමඟ “සමාජමය වශයෙන්” සම්බන්ධ වූ එකම අවස්ථාව වූයේ 1985 මාග්‍රට් තැචර් ශ්‍රී ලංකාවට පැමිණි කාලයයි. “සන්ඩේ ලීඩර්” හිටපු කර්තෘ ලසන්ත වික්‍රමතුංග සහ මම ඒ වන විට “දි අයිලන්ඩ්” හි සේවය කරමින් සිටි අතර ඇයගේ සංචාරය වාර්තා කිරීමට මහනුවරට පැමිණ සිටියෙමු.

එවකට අධ්‍යාපන හා යෞවන කටයුතු ඇමැති රනිල් වික්‍රමසිංහ මහතා අපට රාත්‍රී භෝජන සංග්‍රහයකට ආරාධනා කළේය. ඔහු දක්ෂ සංවාදශීලී සහ මිත්‍රශීලී පෞරුෂයක් බව මට පෙනී ගියේය. ඔහු හොඳින් කියවා හොඳින් දැනුවත් විය. ඔහුගේ සංවාදයේ විස්තර මට දැන් මතක නැතත්, මිනිසුන් සහ කාරණා පිළිබඳ ඔහුගේ අතිමහත් දැනුම ගැන මම අතිශයින් පැහැදී සිටි බව මට මතකයි.

අපි ගොඩක් විහිලු කළා, ගොඩක් හිනා වුණා. මට මතකයි බෑන්ඩ් එක ළඟට එනකොට රනිල් මරියසෙල්ගේ “මහනුවර ළමිස්සි” වාදනය කිරීමට තෝරා ගත්තා. ඔහු එවකට තනිකඩයෙක් වූ අතර ඔහුගේ "මැණිකේ" කවුදැයි අපි ඔහුට විහිළු කළෙමු. ඔහු එය හොඳ හාස්‍යජනක ලෙස ගත්තේය. එය ඉතා සුන්දර සන්ධ්‍යාවක් විය.

මම ලංකාවෙන් ගියේ 1988. කැනඩාවේ ඉඳන් "ද සන්ඩි ලීඩර්" පත්‍රයට ලියනකොට ඔස්ලෝ පහසුකම් සලසන සාම ක්‍රියාවලිය වගේ සමහර ප්‍රශ්න ගැන රනිල්ගේ අදහස් මට දැන ගන්න ලැබුනේ ලසන්ත හරහා. මම රනිල් එක්ක කෙලින්ම සම්බන්ධ වුණේ නැහැ.

2013 දෙසැම්බරයේ මම කලින් මෙම ලිපියේ සඳහන් කළ “ඩේලි මිරර්” හි ලිපියක් ලිව්වෙමි. රනිල් මට කොළඹ ඉඳන් දුරකථනයෙන් කතා කරලා ඒකට ස්තුති කළා. 2014 දී "එල්ටීටීඊ බලහත්කාර වර්ජනයෙන් 2005 දී රනිල්ට ජනාධිපතිකම නැති විය" මැයෙන් ලිපියක් ලිව්වෙමි. එය 2014 ඔක්තෝබර් 24 වැනි දින "ඩේලි මිරර්" පත්‍රයේ පළ විය. නැවතත් එජාප නායක වික්‍රමසිංහ මහතා මට කෙළින්ම දුරකථනයෙන් කතා කොට ස්තුතිය පුද කළේය.

එම ලිපියෙන් මම එල්ටීටීඊයට රනිල්ගේ පරාජය අවශ්‍ය වූයේ කෙසේද සහ ඇයි දැයි සවිස්තරාත්මකව පැහැදිලි කර තිබුණි. එම ලිපියේ පිටපත් එදා “ශ්‍රීකොත” හිදී විශාල ලෙස බෙදා හැර ඇති බව පසුව UNP ආරංචි මාර්ගවලින් මට දැනගන්නට ලැබිණි. 2005 ජනාධිපතිවරණය පිළිබඳ සත්‍ය දැනගැනීම සඳහා ඩීබීඑස් ජෙයරාජ්ගේ ලිපිය කියවන ලෙස ඔහු ප්‍රේක්ෂකයන්ට කී බව වාර්තා වේ.
මෙම ලිපිය 2022 මැයි 21 වැනි දින “ඩේලි මිරර්” හි “D.B.S.Jeyaraj Column” හි ප්‍රකාශයට පත් කරන ලදී. එයට මෙතැනින් ප්‍රවේශ විය හැක:

ta.title: ரணிலின் மீள்வருகை: பிரதமர் விக்கிரமசிங்கவின் குறிப்பிடத்தக்க நெகிழ்ச்சி
body_lines: ரணில் என அழைக்கப்படும் ரணில் ஸ்ரீயான் விக்கிரமசிங்க இலங்கையின் பிரதமராக ஆறாவது முறையாக மீண்டும் ஆட்சியமைத்துள்ளார். புதிய பிரதமர் பொதுத் தேர்தலில் மக்களால் தேர்ந்தெடுக்கப்படவில்லை அல்லது பாராளுமன்றத்தில் பெரும்பான்மையான எம்.பி.க்களால் அங்கீகரிக்கப்படவில்லை. கடந்த நாடாளுமன்றத் தேர்தலில் தோற்கடிக்கப்பட்ட ஐக்கிய தேசியக் கட்சியின் (UNP) தலைவர் ரணில். இப்போது பாராளுமன்றத்தில் ஐக்கிய தேசியக் கட்சியின் ஏக பிரதிநிதி அவர். லோன் எம்.பி முதல் புதிய பிரதமர் வரை அவர் பதவியேற்றதை சில செய்தித்தாள்கள் விவரித்தன.

ரணில் மிகவும் வித்தியாசமான சூழ்நிலையில் பதவிக்கு ஏறினார். தோல்வியுற்ற, திவாலான அரசின் பிரதமராக அவர் வலிமையான சவால்களை எதிர்கொள்கிறார். ரணில் விக்கிரமசிங்கவை பிரதமராக நியமித்ததன் விளைவுகள், தற்போதைய அரசியல் சூழலின் சூட்சுமங்கள் மற்றும் எதிர்காலத்தில் பாராளுமன்றத்தில் விளையாடும் தன்மை ஆகியவை இந்தக் கட்டுரையின் இரண்டாம் பாகத்தில் விரிவாக ஆராயப்படும்.

2022 மே 16 ஆம் திகதி பிரதமர் ரணில் விக்கிரமசிங்க அவர்கள் ஆற்றிய விசேட அறிக்கையிலிருந்து உத்வேகம் அளிக்கும் சில பத்திகளை இப்போது நான் பிரித்தெடுக்கிறேன். இலங்கையின் பொருளாதாரத்தின் அபாயகரமான நிலை குறித்த உண்மையை ரணில் வெளிப்படுத்தினார். இந்த முயற்சிக்கு அனைவரும் ஆதரவளிக்க வேண்டும் என்று அவர் கேட்டுக் கொண்டார். தொடர்புடைய பத்திகள் இதோ-:

“கடந்த வியாழன் அன்று நான் பிரதமராக பதவி ஏற்றேன். இந்த பதவியை நான் கோரவில்லை. நாடு எதிர்நோக்கும் சவாலான சூழ்நிலையில், இந்தப் பதவியை ஏற்குமாறு ஜனாதிபதி என்னை அழைத்தார். ஒரு அரசியல் தலைவர் என்ற ரீதியில் மட்டுமன்றி, கொழும்பு பல்கலைக்கழக சட்ட பீடத்தின் இலவசக் கல்வியின் மூலம் பயனடைந்த தேசியத் தலைவர் என்ற ரீதியிலும் இந்தக் கடமையை நான் ஏற்றுக்கொண்டேன்.
"அடுத்த இரண்டு மாதங்கள் எங்கள் வாழ்க்கையில் மிகவும் கடினமானதாக இருக்கும். இந்த காலகட்டத்தின் சவால்களை எதிர்கொள்ளவும் சில தியாகங்களைச் செய்யவும் நம்மைத் தயார்படுத்திக் கொள்ள வேண்டும்.

“உண்மையை மறைக்கவும், பொதுமக்களிடம் பொய் சொல்லவும் எனக்கு விருப்பம் இல்லை. இந்த உண்மைகள் விரும்பத்தகாததாகவும் திகிலூட்டுவதாகவும் இருந்தாலும் உண்மை நிலை இதுதான். ஒரு குறுகிய காலத்திற்கு, நாம் கடந்து வந்த கடினமான காலங்களை விட நமது எதிர்காலம் மிகவும் கடினமாக இருக்கும். நாம் கணிசமான சவால்களையும், துன்பங்களையும் சந்திப்போம். இருப்பினும், இது

காலம் நீண்டதாக இருக்காது. வரவிருக்கும் மாதங்களில், எங்கள் வெளிநாட்டு நட்பு நாடுகள் எங்களுக்கு உதவுவார்கள். அவர்கள் ஏற்கனவே தங்கள் ஆதரவை உறுதியளித்துள்ளனர். எனவே, அடுத்த இரண்டு மாதங்கள் பொறுமையாக இருக்க வேண்டும்.இருப்பினும், இந்த நிலையை நம்மால் சமாளிக்க முடியும். அப்படிச் செய்தால் புதிய பாதையில் செல்ல வேண்டியிருக்கும்.”

"தற்போதைய நெருக்கடிக்கு தீர்வு காண அனைத்து அரசியல் கட்சிகளின் பங்கேற்புடன் ஒரு தேசிய சட்டமன்றம் அல்லது அரசியல் அமைப்பை நாம் உடனடியாக நிறுவ வேண்டும். இதன் மூலம் அனைத்துத் தரப்பினருடனும் கலந்துரையாடி, குறுகிய, நடுத்தர மற்றும் நீண்ட கால செயல் திட்டங்களுக்கான முடிவுகளை எடுக்கவும், குறிப்பிட்ட காலக்கெடுவுக்குள் நமது தேசத்தை மீண்டும் கட்டியெழுப்ப உதவும்.

“மண்ணெண்ணெய், எரிவாயு மற்றும் எரிபொருளுக்கான வரிசைகள் இல்லாத தேசத்தை உருவாக்குவோம்; மின்வெட்டு இல்லாத தேசம், விவசாயம் சுதந்திரமாக செழிக்கக் கூடிய வளங்கள் நிறைந்த நாடு; இளைஞர்களின் எதிர்காலம் பாதுகாப்பான தேசம்; மக்கள் உழைப்பை வரிசையிலும் போராட்டங்களிலும் வீணாக்கத் தேவையில்லாத தேசம்; ஒவ்வொருவரும் ஒரு நாளைக்கு மூன்று சதுர வேளை உணவுடன் தங்கள் வாழ்க்கையை சுதந்திரமாக நடத்தக்கூடிய தேசம்."

"நான் ஒரு ஆபத்தான சவாலை எதிர்கொள்கிறேன். கெளகேசியன் சுண்ணாம்பு வட்டத்தில், உடைந்த கயிறு பாலத்தை க்ருஷா தன் சொந்தமில்லாத குழந்தையை தூக்கிக்கொண்டு கடந்தாள். இது இன்னும் கடினமான செயலாகும். பள்ளம் ஆழமானது மற்றும் அதன் அடிப்பகுதியை பார்க்க முடியாது. பாலம் மெல்லிய கண்ணாடியால் ஆனது மற்றும் கைப்பிடி இல்லை. நான் கழற்ற முடியாத கூர்மையான நகங்களைக் கொண்ட காலணிகளை அணிந்திருக்கிறேன். குழந்தையைப் பத்திரமாக மறுபுறம் அழைத்துச் செல்வதுதான் என் பணி.

“எங்கள் தேசத்திற்கான இந்த சவாலை நான் ஏற்றுக்கொள்கிறேன். எனது குறிக்கோள் மற்றும் அர்ப்பணிப்பு ஒரு தனிநபரையோ, குடும்பத்தையோ, கட்சியையோ காப்பாற்றுவது அல்ல. இந்த நாட்டின் அனைத்து மக்களையும் நமது இளைய தலைமுறையின் எதிர்காலத்தையும் காப்பாற்றுவதே எனது நோக்கம். தேவைப்பட்டால் என் உயிரைப் பணயம் வைத்து இந்தப் பணியை நான் மேற்கொள்வேன், மேலும் நாங்கள் எதிர்கொள்ளும் சவால்களைச் சமாளிப்பேன். இந்த முயற்சியில் எனக்கு உங்களின் ஆதரவை வழங்குமாறு கேட்டுக்கொள்கிறேன்.எங்கள் தேசத்திற்கான எனது கடமையை நான் நிறைவேற்றுவேன். அதுவே உங்களுக்கு எனது வாக்குறுதியாகும்.

ரணில் விக்கிரமசிங்க பிரதமராக பதவியேற்ற பிறகு, அவமதிப்பு, கேலி, கிண்டல்கள் மற்றும் வஞ்சகங்களுக்கு இலக்காகியுள்ளார். இந்தத் தாக்குதல்கள் அவருக்குப் புதிதல்ல. ரணில் அரசியலில் ஒரு குறிப்பிட்ட அந்தஸ்தைப் பெற்ற காலத்திலிருந்தே இது "பிரதேசத்துடன் செல்கிறது". எவ்வாறாயினும், இந்த தாக்குதல்களில் மிகக் குறைவானவை பொருளாதாரத்தை சரிசெய்து புதுப்பிக்கும் திறனைப் பற்றியவை. அவரது மோசமான விமர்சகர்கள் கூட, இலங்கையைப் பொருளாதாரச் சீர்கேட்டில் இருந்து எவராலும் மீட்டெடுக்க முடியுமென்றால், அது ரணில்தான் என்பதை வெறுப்புடன் ஒப்புக்கொள்வார்கள். உண்மையில் அதுதான் விக்கிரமசிங்கவின் தனித்துவமான விற்பனைப் புள்ளி!

பொருளாதார மறுமலர்ச்சிக்கு அரசியல் தலைமைத்துவத்தை வழங்குவதில் ரணில் விக்கிரமசிங்கவின் திறமை கடந்த காலங்களில் இந்த பத்தியில் வலியுறுத்தப்பட்டது. “ரணில் விக்கிரமசிங்க, ஐக்கிய தேசியக் கட்சியின் தலைமைத்துவம் மற்றும் டினா காரணி” என்பது எட்டு வருடங்களுக்கு முன்னர் நான் எழுதிய கட்டுரையின் தலைப்பு. டிசம்பர் 20 2013 “டெய்லி மிரர்” நாளிதழில் வெளியான கட்டுரை, அப்போதைய அரசியல் சூழலின் பின்னணியில் எழுதப்பட்டது.

அனைத்து சக்தி வாய்ந்த ஜனாதிபதி மஹிந்த ராஜபக்ஷ அந்த நேரத்தில் தோற்கடிக்க முடியாதவராக இருந்தார். பிரதான எதிர்க்கட்சியான ஐ.தே.க தலைவர் ரணில் விக்கிரமசிங்க, மகிந்தவை தோற்கடிக்க முடியாத "தொடர் தோல்வியுற்றவராக" பலராலும் கருதப்பட்டார். ரணிலிடம் இருந்து தலைமைத்துவத்தை கைப்பற்றுவதற்கு ஐக்கிய தேசியக் கட்சியில் சிலர் சதி செய்து கொண்டிருந்தனர்.

எனது கட்டுரை ரணிலுக்கு ஆதரவாக இருந்தது, அப்போது யூ.என்.பி. தலைவராக அவருக்கு "மாற்று இல்லை" (டினா) என்று வாதிட்டேன். போர் வெற்றியின் பின்னர் மகிழ்ச்சி மறைந்து, இலங்கையின் பொருளாதார மேம்பாடு தொடர்பான பிரச்சினைகள் வாக்காளர்களுக்கு மிகவும் முக்கியமானதாக மாறியதையும் நான் சுட்டிக்காட்டினேன். ரணில் விக்கிரமசிங்க சிறந்த தெரிவாக முன்னிறுத்தப்படலாம். நான் அப்போது எழுதியதை பின்வரும் பகுதிகள் சுட்டிக்காட்டுகின்றன -

“பெரும்பான்மைவாதத்தின் வெற்றி மற்றும் ஜனாதிபதி இராஜபக்ஷவின் பிரபல்யத்தைப் பார்க்கும்போது, ​​இந்த ஆட்சியை தேர்தலில் தோற்கடிக்க முடியாது என்பது கிட்டத்தட்ட சாத்தியமற்றதாகத் தோன்றலாம். ஆனால் பின்னர் எல்லாமே நிலையற்றவை மற்றும் விஷயங்கள் மாறுகின்றன. அரசியல் புகழ் என்பது தற்காலிகமானது.

"வின்ஸ்டன் சர்ச்சில் போரில் வெற்றி பெற்றார், ஆனால் 1945 இல் கிளெமென்ட் அட்லியால் வெளியேற்றப்பட்டார் என்பதை நினைவில் கொள்ள வேண்டும். இந்திரா காந்தி 1971 இல் பாகிஸ்தானை இராணுவ வெற்றியின் மூலம் துண்டாடினார், ஆனால் அவசரநிலைக்குப் பிறகு 1977 இல் எதிர்பாராத விதமாக வெளியேற்றப்பட்டார். ஜார்ஜ் புஷ் சீனியர் வளைகுடாப் போரில் வெற்றி பெற்றார், ஆனால் 1992 இல் ஜார்ஜ் புஷ் ஜூனியர் காபூலையும் பாக்தாத்தையும் கைப்பற்றினார், ஆனால் அவரது வால் கீழே இறங்கினார். வரலாற்றில் மிகவும் செல்வாக்கற்ற அமெரிக்க ஜனாதிபதியாக முடிவடையும்.

“இராஜபக்ஷ ஆட்சியானது, யுத்த வெற்றியை மக்களின் அபினியாகப் பயன்படுத்துவதன் மூலம் அதற்கு எதிரான அதிருப்தியை அடக்கியுள்ளது அல்லது திசை திருப்பியுள்ளது. ஆனால் போர் பல ஆண்டுகளுக்கு முன்பே முடிவடைந்தது மற்றும் போர் வெற்றியின் மூலம் அதன் குறைபாடுகளை நிரந்தரமாக நியாயப்படுத்த முடியாது. பொருளாதார செயல்திறன் பற்றிய சந்தேகங்கள் உள்ளன. இந்த ஆட்சிக்கு எதிரான உறவுமுறை, ஊழல், அடக்குமுறை, சர்வாதிகாரம், தவறான நிர்வாகம் மற்றும் அதிகார துஷ்பிரயோகம்/துஷ்பிரயோகம் போன்ற குற்றச்சாட்டுகள் பெருகி வருகின்றன. .

"மகிழ்ச்சி தணிந்தவுடன், நாடு சிறந்த பொருளாதார வாய்ப்புகளுக்காக ஏங்கத் தொடங்கும். போர் முனையில் மட்டும் வெற்றியால் மனிதன் வாழவில்லை, ரொட்டி, சாதம், பருப்பு, சாம்போல் ஆகியவற்றால் வாழ்கிறான். இந்த ஆட்சியை வழங்க முடியாவிட்டால் மக்கள் மாற்றத்தை வரவேற்கலாம்.

ரணில் விக்கிரமசிங்கவின் கட்சி நிச்சயமாக அவருக்கு ஆதரவாக நிற்கும் என்பதை இங்குதான் பெற முடியும். பொருளாதார அதிசயம் செய்யக்கூடிய மனிதராக அவரை முன்னிறுத்தலாம். உண்மையான தேசிய ஒற்றுமையை உருவாக்கி அதன் மக்களை ஒன்றிணைக்கும் மனிதராகவும் அவர் பதவி உயர்வு பெற முடியும்.

“விக்கிரமசிங்க அடிப்படையில் ஒரு தொழில்நுட்ப வல்லுநர் மற்றும் பதவிக்கு தேர்ந்தெடுக்கப்பட்டால் சுமூகமான மற்றும் திறமையான நிர்வாகத்தை நடத்துவார். பொருளாதாரத்தில் உறுதியான பிடிப்பு கொண்ட அவர், பொருளாதார விடுதலைக்கான பாதையில் நாட்டை வழிநடத்த சிறந்த மனிதராக இருப்பார்.

நாட்டின் பொருளாதார மேம்பாட்டிற்கான முயற்சிகளை முன்னெடுப்பதற்கு ரணில் சிறந்த தெரிவு என்று நான் அப்போது எழுதியது இப்போது உண்மையாகிவிட்டது. அவர் தெரிவு செய்யப்படவில்லை மற்றும் ஒரு தனியான UNP பாராளுமன்ற உறுப்பினர். ஆயினும்கூட, அவர் இப்போது பொருளாதார மீட்சிப் பணியில் தலைமைப் போர்வையை அணிந்துள்ளார். பெர்டோல்ட் பிரெக்ட்டின் க்ருஷாவைப் போல ரணிலும் இப்போது பயமுறுத்தும் முரண்பாடுகளை எதிர்கொண்டு குழந்தையை சுமந்து செல்கிறார். பிராவோ ரணில்!

ரணில் விக்கிரமசிங்க ஜூனியஸ் ரிச்சர்ட் ஜயவர்தன தலைமையிலான "பச்சை யானை" ஜாகர்நாட்டின் ஒரு பகுதியாக இருந்தார், இது ஜூலை 21, 1977 பொதுத் தேர்தலில் 168 ஆசனங்களில் 141 ஐ வென்றது. ஆகஸ்ட் 2020 முதல் ஜூன் 2021 வரை ஒரு குறுகிய இடைவெளியைத் தவிர, அவர் தொடர்ந்து பாராளுமன்ற உறுப்பினராக இருந்து வருகிறார். இது ரணிலின் குறிப்பிடத்தக்க நெகிழ்ச்சியின் ஒரு குறிகாட்டியாகும். தற்போதைய நாடாளுமன்றத்தில் ரணிலைப் போல வேறு எந்த எம்.பி.க்கும் இல்லை. வாசுதேவ நாணயக்கார மற்றும் மகிந்த ராஜபக்ச ஆகியோர் 1970 இல் ரணிலுக்கு முன்னர் பாராளுமன்றத்திற்கு தேர்ந்தெடுக்கப்பட்டனர். ஆனால் அவர்கள் இருவரும் 1977 இல் தோல்வியடைந்து பல ஆண்டுகளாக பாராளுமன்றத்தில் இருக்கவில்லை. ராஜவரோதயம் சம்பந்தன் 1977 ஆம் ஆண்டு ரணிலுடன் இணைந்து பாராளுமன்றத்தில் நுழைந்தார் ஆனால் அவரும் இடையில் இடைவெளிகளை சந்தித்தார். 1983 ஆம் ஆண்டு ஆறாவது அரசியலமைப்பு திருத்தத்தின் கீழ் சத்தியப்பிரமாணம் செய்ய மறுத்ததை அடுத்து சம்பந்தன் தனது ஆசனத்தை இழந்தார்.

1977 ஆம் ஆண்டு வாக்கெடுப்பு என்பது பழைய முதல் கடந்த பதவி வெற்றி முறையின் கீழ் நடத்தப்பட்ட கடைசி நாடாளுமன்றத் தேர்தல் ஆகும். புதிதாக உருவாக்கப்பட்ட பியகம தொகுதியில் ரணில் அவர்களே போட்டியிட்டு 6769 வாக்குகள் பெரும்பான்மையுடன் வெற்றி பெற்றார். அவர் 22,045 வாக்குகளைப் பெற்றார். ஸ்ரீலங்கா சுதந்திரக் கட்சியின் (SLFP) எச்.ஏ.டேவிட் ஹபாங்கம 15,276 வாக்குகளைப் பெற்று இரண்டாவது இடத்தைப் பிடித்தார். 1976 ஆம் ஆண்டு எல்லை நிர்ணயத்தில் களனி மற்றும் மஹர தேர்தல்களில் பியகம வெட்டப்பட்டது. 1975 இல் களனியின் ஐக்கிய தேசியக் கட்சியின் அமைப்பாளராக ரணில் அரசியலில் ஞானஸ்நானம் பெற்றார். பியகம தேர்தல் தொகுதி உருவானது, அவர் புதிய தொகுதிக்கு மாறினார். 1977 இல் களனியில் போட்டியிட்டு வெற்றி பெற்றவர் ஐக்கிய தேசியக் கட்சியின் பலமான சிறில் மெத்தியூ.

நாற்பது வருடங்கள் அரசியலில் நீண்ட காலம். 2017 ஆம் ஆண்டு தனது அரசியல் பயணத்தில் விக்கிரமசிங்க ஒரு குறிப்பிடத்தக்க மைல்கதையை எட்டினார். அவர் தொடர்ந்து நான்கு தசாப்தங்கள் பாராளுமன்றத்தில் இருந்ததன் மூலம், 1977 ஆம் ஆண்டு தொடங்கி, 1989, 1994, 2000, 2001, 2004, 2010 மற்றும் 2010 மற்றும் 2015 ஆகிய ஆண்டுகளில் பாராளுமன்ற தேர்தல் புயல்களை ரணில் எதிர்கொண்டார். 1989 ஆம் ஆண்டு கம்பஹா தேர்தல் மாவட்டத்தில் புதிய விகிதாசாரப் பிரதிநிதித்துவ முறையின் கீழ் வெற்றிபெற்றார். அதன் பின்னர் 2020 ஆம் ஆண்டு வரை ஐக்கிய தேசியக் கட்சியின் வேட்பாளர் பட்டியலில் விருப்பு வாக்குகளைப் பெற்று கொழும்பு மாவட்டத்தில் இருந்து பாராளுமன்றத்திற்குத் தெரிவானார். ரணில் 2020 இல் முதல் தடவையாக தோல்வியைச் சுவைத்தார். ஆகஸ்ட் 2020 வாக்கெடுப்பில் தோற்கடிக்கப்பட்டது. தலைவர் விக்கிரமசிங்க உட்பட அதன் வேட்பாளர்கள் யாரும் தேர்ந்தெடுக்கப்படவில்லை. ஆனால் தேசியப் பட்டியலில் ஒரு நியமன எம்.பி.க்கு அக்கட்சிக்கு உரிமை இருந்தது. இவ்வாறு ரணில் மீண்டும் - 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டு ஜூன் மாதம் நியமன எம்.பி.யாக பாராளுமன்றத்தில் நுழைந்து பல மாதங்களாக பாராளுமன்றத்தில் "தனி யானை"யாக இருந்தார்.

கடந்த வாரம் ஆறாவது முறையாக புதிய பிரதமராக ரணில் பதவியேற்றார். இது ஒரு பதிவு. டட்லி சேனநாயக்க நான்கு முறை பிரதமராக பதவியேற்றார். ரணிலைப் பொறுத்தமட்டில் அவர் குறுகிய காலத்திற்கு மட்டுமே பிரதமராக இருந்துள்ளார். 1994 ஆம் ஆண்டு மே மாதம் ஜனாதிபதி ரணசிங்க பிரேமதாச விடுதலைப் புலிகளால் படுகொலை செய்யப்பட்ட பின்னர் அவர் முதலில் பிரதமரானார். பிரதமர் டி.பி. விஜேதுங்க ஜனாதிபதியானார், அவருக்குப் பின் ரணில் பிரதமரானார். ஆகஸ்ட் 1994 வரை பதவியில் இருந்தார். ரணில் 1994 முதல் 2001 வரை எதிர்க்கட்சித் தலைவராக இருந்தார்.

2001 டிசம்பரில் ரணில் பிரதமராகத் தேர்ந்தெடுக்கப்பட்டார் மற்றும் ஜனாதிபதி சந்திரிகா குமாரதுங்கவுடன் அரசியல் ஒத்துழைப்பை மேற்கொண்டார். அவர் 2004 இல் UNP தலைமையிலான அரசாங்கத்தை கலைத்து புதிய தேர்தலை நடத்தினார். ஏப்ரல் 2004 தேர்தலில் யூஎன்பி தோற்கடிக்கப்பட்டது. அதன்பின் 2015 வரை ரணில் எதிர்க்கட்சித் தலைவராக இருந்தார். அதிக ஆண்டுகள் எதிர்க்கட்சித் தலைவராக இருந்தவர் என்ற சாதனையை ரணில் படைத்துள்ளார்.

மைத்ரிபால சிறிசேனா ராஜபக்ச அரசில் இருந்து விலகி ஐ.தே.க தலைமையிலான பல கட்சி கூட்டணியின் ஜனாதிபதி வேட்பாளராக ஆனார். சிறீசேனா ஜனவரி 2015 இல் ஜனாதிபதியாகத் தேர்ந்தெடுக்கப்பட்டார் மற்றும் ரணில் விக்கிரமசிங்கவின் பிரதமராக நியமிக்கப்பட்டார், ஆனால் யூஎன்பிக்கு பாராளுமன்றத்தில் 50 இடங்கள் மட்டுமே இருந்தன. ஆகஸ்ட் 2015 நாடாளுமன்றத் தேர்தலுக்குப் பிறகு, ரணில் நான்காவது முறையாக பிரதமராகப் பதவியேற்றார். ஐக்கிய தேசியக் கட்சிக்கு அறுதிப் பெரும்பான்மை கிடைக்காவிட்டாலும், ஸ்ரீலங்கா சுதந்திரக் கட்சியின் சில எம்.பி.க்களின் உதவியோடு ஒரு நிலையான அரசாங்கம் அமைக்கப்பட்டது.

அதனால் மைத்திரிபால ஜனாதிபதியாகவும் ரணில் பிரதமராகவும் ஆனார்கள். விரைவிலேயே கூர்மையான வேறுபாடுகள் - அரசியல் மற்றும் தனிப்பட்ட - இருவருக்கும் இடையே வெளிவரத் தொடங்கியது. அவர்கள் கொண்டு வந்த "நல்லாட்சி" அரசாங்கம் படிப்படியாக அதன் பொலிவை இழந்தது. அரசியல் இரட்டைக் குறுக்கு முறையின் மோசமான நிகழ்வுகளில் ஒன்றில், சிறிசேன 2018 அக்டோபரில் மஹிந்தவுடன் ஒப்பந்தம் செய்து ரணிலுக்குப் பதிலாக அவரைப் பிரதமராக நியமித்தார். 52 நாள் அரசியல் மற்றும் சட்டப் போருக்குப் பிறகு விக்கிரமசிங்க மீண்டும் பிரதமரானார். அவர் 2018 டிசம்பரில் ஐந்தாவது முறையாக பிரதமராகப் பதவியேற்றார்.

ஏப்ரல் 21, 2019 ஈஸ்டர் ஞாயிறு குண்டுத் தாக்குதல்கள் அரசியல் சூழலை தீவிரமாக மாற்றியது. முன்னாள் பாதுகாப்புச் செயலாளர் கோட்டாபய ராஜபக்ச, "தேசிய பாதுகாப்பிற்கான வலுவான தலைவர்" மேடையில் ஜனாதிபதியாக தேர்ந்தெடுக்கப்பட்டதன் மூலம் ராஜபக்சக்களை மீண்டும் ஆட்சிக்கு வரச் செய்தார். நாடாளுமன்றத் தேர்தலில் ராஜபக்சே தலைமையிலான ஸ்ரீலங்கா பொதுஜன பெரமுனாவுடன் (SLPP) இணைந்ததன் மூலம் சிறிசன் தனது தோலைக் காப்பாற்றி எம்பியாக தேர்ந்தெடுக்கப்பட்டார்.

எவ்வாறாயினும், சமகி ஜன பலவேகய (SJB) யை உருவாக்கிய அவரது பிரதி சஜித் பிரேமதாசவின் கைகளால் விக்மசிங்க அரசியல் சிரமங்களுக்கு உள்ளானார். ஐக்கிய தேசியக் கட்சியின் பெரும்பாலான பாராளுமன்ற உறுப்பினர்கள் ரணிலை விட்டு வெளியேறினர். ஐக்கிய தேசியக் கட்சியின் சிறுபான்மைக் கட்சிக் கூட்டாளிகளும் அவ்வாறே செய்தனர். 2020 தேர்தலில் பழைய கட்சி தோற்கடிக்கப்பட்டது. தலைவர் விக்கிரமசிங்க உட்பட அதன் வேட்பாளர்கள் யாரும் தேர்ந்தெடுக்கப்படவில்லை. ஆனால் அந்த கட்சிக்கு தேசிய பட்டியலில் ஒரு ஆசனம் கிடைத்தது மற்றும் ரணில் மீண்டும் 2021 ஜூன் மாதம் பாராளுமன்ற உறுப்பினராக நியமனம் செய்யப்பட்டார். ஒரு வருடத்தின் பின்னர் UNP யின் ஒரே பாராளுமன்ற உறுப்பினர் ஆறாவது முறையாக 2022 மே 12 அன்று பிரதமராக பதவியேற்றார்.

ரணில் தனது நீண்ட அரசியல் வாழ்க்கைக்கு பின்னரும் ஜனாதிபதியாக தேர்ந்தெடுக்கப்படவில்லை. எவ்வாறாயினும் தமிழீழ விடுதலைப் புலிகளினால் இரண்டு தடவைகள் ஜனாதிபதி பதவியை ரணில் இழந்தார் என்பதை மறந்துவிடக் கூடாது. 1999 ஆம் ஆண்டு சந்திரிகா குமாரதுங்க மீது புலிகள் நடத்திய கருக்கலைப்பு படுகொலை முயற்சி அவரை காயப்படுத்தியது. அவள் ஒரு கண்ணை இழந்தாள். இது அனுதாப அலையில் சவாரி செய்து வெற்றி பெற உதவியது. 2005 ஆம் ஆண்டு புலிகள் பலவந்தமான புறக்கணிப்பு மூலம் தமிழர்களை வாக்களிக்க விடாமல் தடுத்தனர். இது விக்கிரமசிங்கவின் சாத்தியமான வாக்குகளை குறைத்தது, இதன் விளைவாக ஒரு குறுகிய வித்தியாசத்தில் தோல்வி ஏற்பட்டது. மகிந்த ராஜபக்ச புறக்கணிப்பு தொடர்பாக புலிகளுடன் ஒப்பந்தம் செய்து கொண்டார் என்பது பின்னர் அறியப்பட்டது.

2010 மற்றும் 2015 ஆம் ஆண்டுகளில் ரணில் ஜனாதிபதி தேர்தலில் போட்டியிடவில்லை. அவர் முறையே சரத் பொன்சேகாவுக்கும் மைத்திரிபால சிறிசேனவுக்கும் ஆதரவாக நின்றார். 2019 ஆம் ஆண்டு நீடித்த அரசியல் சண்டையின் பின்னர், ரணில் ஐ.தே.கவின் பிரதித் தலைவர் சஜித் பிரேமதாசவை ஜனாதிபதித் தேர்தலில் போட்டியிட அனுமதித்தார். கோட்டாபய ராஜபக்சவின் கௌரவமான வெளியேற்றத்திற்குப் பின்னர் ரணில் விக்கிரமசிங்க ஜனாதிபதியாகலாம் என்று தற்போது பல ஊகங்கள் உள்ளன. இந்த நேரத்தில் அது ஒரு தொலைதூர சாத்தியம் என்று தோன்றுகிறது. இருப்பினும், டோரிஸ் டே "தி மேன் ஹூ தெரி மச்" திரைப்படத்தில் பாடியது போல் - "க்யூ செரா, சேரா, எதுவாக இருக்கும், இருக்கும்".

இந்தக் கட்டுரையின் முதல் பகுதியை ஒரு தனிப்பட்ட குறிப்பில் முடிக்கிறேன். 1977ஆம் ஆண்டு ரணில் விக்கிரமசிங்க பாராளுமன்றத்தில் பிரவேசித்த அதே வருடத்தில் “வீரகேசரி” தமிழ் நாளிதழில் பயிற்சி நிருபராக நான் பத்திரிகைத் துறையில் நுழைந்தேன். 77 வாக்கெடுப்புக்குப் பின்னரே ரணிலுடன் முதன்முறையாகப் பேசுவதற்கான வாய்ப்பு கிடைத்தது. நான் ஒரே ஒரு வார்த்தை பேச, அவர் இரண்டு வார்த்தைகளில் பதிலளித்தார். அப்போது நடந்தது இதுதான்.

1977ஆம் ஆண்டு ரணில் விக்கிரமசிங்க முதன்முறையாக வெற்றி பெற்றபோது, ​​“வீரகேசரி”யில் முதியவர்கள் மத்தியில் பெரும் பரபரப்பு ஏற்பட்டது. ஏனெனில், ரணிலின் தந்தை எஸ்மன்ட் விக்கிரமசிங்க, 20ஆம் நூற்றாண்டின் அறுபதுகளின் பிற்பகுதியிலும் எழுபதுகளின் தொடக்கத்திலும் சில வருடங்களாக “வீரகேசரி” பத்திரிகைகளின் குழுமத்தின் தலைவராக இருந்தார். பின்னர் எஸ்மண்ட் வெளியேறினார் மற்றும் "வீரகேசரி" மீண்டும் கட்டமைக்கப்பட்ட சிலோன் லிமிடெட் எக்ஸ்பிரஸ் செய்தித்தாள்களின் கீழ் வந்தது.

மூத்த புகைப்படக் கலைஞர் ரொட்ரிகோ போன்ற "வீரகேசரி"யில் உள்ள பழைய டைமர்கள் சிலர் எஸ்மண்டை "தலைவர்" என்று குறிப்பிடுவார்கள் என்றாலும் தொழிலதிபர் ஏ. எஸ்.ஞானம் 1977 ஆம் ஆண்டு எக்ஸ்பிரஸ் நாளிதழ்களின் தலைவராக இருந்தார். ரணில் பாராளுமன்ற உறுப்பினராகத் தேர்ந்தெடுக்கப்பட்ட பின்னர் தனது 28வது வயதில் வெளிவிவகார பிரதி அமைச்சராக நியமிக்கப்பட்டார். ஒரு நாள் காலை புதிய அமைச்சர்கள் மற்றும் துணை அமைச்சர்கள் பற்றிய விவரங்கள் அறிவிக்கப்பட்டபோது, ​​ரொட்ரிகோ யாருடனோ தொலைபேசியில் பேசிக் கொண்டிருந்தார். நான் அவ்வழியே சென்றபோது, ​​ரொட்டி தொலைபேசியை என் கைகளில் திணித்து, “தலைவரின் மகன் ரணில் பிரதி வெளிவிவகார அமைச்சர். அவரை வாழ்த்துகிறேன்". அதனால் "வாழ்த்துக்கள்" என்று ஒரு வார்த்தை சொன்னேன்!. அவர் "நன்றி" என்று பதிலளித்தார். அவ்வளவுதான். போனை மீண்டும் ரோட்ரிகோவிடம் கொடுத்தேன்.

நான் இலங்கையில் இருந்த வருடங்களில் ஊடகவியலாளனாக எனது தொழில் ரீதியாக ரணில் விக்கிரமசிங்கவுடன் உரையாடும் வாய்ப்பு எனக்கு கிடைக்கவில்லை. நான் வெளியிட்ட செய்திகள் என்னை ரணிலின் சுற்றுப்பாதைக்குள் கொண்டு வரவே இல்லை. அந்த நாட்களில் நான் விக்கிரமசிங்கவின் கீழ் அமைச்சுப் பதவிகளை வகிக்கவில்லை, அவருடன் பேசுவதற்கு எனக்கு வாய்ப்பு கிடைக்கவில்லை.

அரசியல் செய்திகள் மற்றும் உள்ளகச் செய்திகளை சேகரிப்பதில் கூட, ஜே.ஆர்.ஜே அமைச்சரவையில் ரணில் விக்கிரமசிங்க எனது அமைச்சு ஆதாரங்களில் ஒருவராக இருக்கவில்லை. நான் அமைச்சர்களான லலித் அத்துலத்முதலி, காமினி திஸாநாயக்க, ஆனந்ததிஸ்ஸ டி அல்விஸ், ஈ.எல். சேனநாயக்க, சௌமியமூர்த்தி தொண்டமான், ஏ.சி.எஸ்.ஹமீட், கே.டபிள்யூ. தேவநாயகம், காமனி ஜயசூரிய மற்றும் பெஸ்டஸ் பெரேரா.

என்னைப் பொறுத்தமட்டில் 1985 இல் மார்கரெட் தாட்சர் இலங்கைக்கு விஜயம் செய்த காலப்பகுதியில் நான் விக்கிரமசிங்கவுடன் "சமூக ரீதியாக" தொடர்பு கொண்ட ஒரே சந்தர்ப்பம். "சண்டே லீடர்" பத்திரிகையின் முன்னாள் ஆசிரியர் லசந்த விக்கிரமதுங்கவும் நானும் அப்போது "தி ஐலண்ட்" இல் பணிபுரிந்து கொண்டிருந்தோம் மற்றும் அவரது விஜயத்தை செய்தி சேகரிக்க கண்டியில் இருந்தோம்.

அப்போது கல்வி மற்றும் இளைஞர் விவகார அமைச்சர் ரணில் விக்கிரமசிங்க எங்களை இரவு உணவிற்கு அழைத்தார். அவர் ஒரு சிறந்த உரையாடல் மற்றும் அன்பான ஆளுமை என்று நான் கண்டேன். அவர் நன்றாகப் படித்து நன்கு அறிந்தவராக இருந்தார். அவர் உரையாடிய விவரங்கள் இப்போது எனக்கு நினைவில் இல்லை என்றாலும், மனிதர்கள் மற்றும் விஷயங்களைப் பற்றிய அவரது பரந்த அறிவால் நான் மிகவும் ஈர்க்கப்பட்டதாக எனக்கு நினைவிருக்கிறது.

நாங்கள் நிறைய கேலி செய்தோம், நிறைய சிரித்தோம். இசைக்குழு சுற்றி வந்தபோது, ​​மரியசெல்லின் "கண்டி லமிஸ்ஸி"யை ரணில் இசைக்கத் தேர்ந்தெடுத்தது எனக்கு நினைவிருக்கிறது. அப்போது அவர் ஒரு பிரம்மச்சாரி, அவருடைய “மெனிகே” யார் என்று அவரை கிண்டல் செய்தோம். அவர் அதை நல்ல நகைச்சுவையாக எடுத்துக் கொண்டார். அது மிகவும் இனிமையான மாலைப் பொழுது.

நான் 1988 இல் இலங்கையை விட்டு வெளியேறினேன். கனடாவில் இருந்து "தி சண்டி லீடர்" பத்திரிகைக்கு எழுதும் போது, ​​ஒஸ்லோவில் ஏற்பாடு செய்யப்பட்ட சமாதான முன்னெடுப்புகள் போன்ற சில விடயங்களில் ரணிலின் கருத்துக்களை லசந்த மூலம் அறிந்துகொண்டேன். நான் ரணிலுடன் நேரடியாக தொடர்பு கொள்ளவில்லை.

டிசம்பர் 2013 இல், "டெய்லி மிரர்" பத்திரிகையில் நான் எழுதிய ஒரு கட்டுரையை, இந்தக் கட்டுரையில் நான் முன்பு குறிப்பிட்டேன். ரணில் கொழும்பில் இருந்து எனக்கு தொலைபேசியில் தொடர்பு கொண்டு நன்றி தெரிவித்தார். 2014 ஆம் ஆண்டு, "புலிகளின் கட்டாயப் புறக்கணிப்பு 2005 இல் ரணில் ஜனாதிபதி பதவியை இழந்தது" என்ற தலைப்பில் நான் ஒரு கட்டுரை எழுதினேன். அது அக்டோபர் 24, 2014 "டெய்லி மிரர்" நாளிதழில் வெளியானது. மீண்டும் ஐ.தே.க தலைவர் விக்கிரமசிங்க என்னை நேரடியாக தொலைபேசியில் தொடர்பு கொண்டு நன்றி தெரிவித்தார்.

அந்தக் கட்டுரையில் ரணிலின் தோல்வியை விடுதலைப் புலிகள் எப்படி, ஏன் விரும்புகிறார்கள் என்பது பற்றி விரிவாக விளக்கியிருந்தேன். அந்தக் கட்டுரையின் பிரதிகள் அப்போது “ஸ்ரீகொத்த”வில் பரவலாக விநியோகிக்கப்பட்டது என்று பின்னர் யூ.என்.பி வட்டாரங்களில் இருந்து கேள்விப்பட்டேன். 2005 ஜனாதிபதித் தேர்தல் குறித்த உண்மையை அறிய டிபிஎஸ் ஜெயராஜின் கட்டுரையைப் படிக்குமாறு அவர் பார்வையாளர்களிடம் கூறியதாக கூறப்படுகிறது.
இந்தக் கட்டுரை மே 21, 2022 அன்று “டெய்லி மிரர்” நாளிதழின் “டி.பி.எஸ்.ஜெயராஜ் நெடுவரிசையில்” வெளியிடப்பட்டது. இதை இங்கே அணுகலாம்:

en.title: Return of Ranil: Remarkable Resilience of Premier Wickremesinghe
body_lines: Ranil Sriyan Wickremesinghe known as  Ranil is  in the seat of power again as Prime Minister of Sri Lanka for the sixth time.  The new Prime Minister was neither elected to office  by the people in a general  election  nor endorsed by a majority of MP’s in Parliament.  Ranil is the leader of  the United National Party(UNP) that had been roundly defeated at the last Parliamentary poll. He is the sole representative of the UNP in Parliament now. From Lone MP to new Prime Minister was how some newspapers described his assumption of office.

Ranil  was virtually catapulted into office through  very peculiar circumstances. He faces formidable challenges as Prime Minister of a failed, bankrupt state. The ramifications of  Ranil Wickremesinghe’s appointment  as  Prime Minister , the intricacies of the current political environment  and  the nature of play in Parliament in the future, would be delved into in greater  detail in the second part of this article.

As for now I am extracting a few inspiring  paragraphs from the  special statement made by Prime Minister Ranil Wickremesinghe on May 16th 2022. Ranil bared the truth about the perilous state of Sri Lanka’s economy  and that he has accepted the challenge of trying to resurrect it. He called upon everyone to support him in this endeavour. Here are the relevant paragraphs-:

“Last Thursday, I accepted office as the Prime Minister. I did not request this position. In face of the challenging situation facing the country, the President invited me to take up this position. I assumed this duty not only as a political leader, but also as national leader who has benefited from free education at the Faculty of Law of the University of Colombo.”
“The next couple of months will be the most difficult ones of our lives. We must prepare ourselves to make some sacrifices and face the challenges of this period.”

“I have no desire to hide the truth and to lie to the public. Although these facts are unpleasant and terrifying, this is the true situation. For a short period, our future will be even more difficult than the tough times that we have passed. We will face considerable challenges and adversity. However, this

period will not be long. In the coming months, our foreign allies will assist us. They have already pledged their support. Therefore, we will have to patiently bear the next couple of months.However, we can overcome this situation. Doing so will require taking a new path.”

“We must immediately establish a national assembly or political body with the participation of all political parties to find solutions for the present crisis. This will enable us to discuss with all parties and to arrive at decisions for short-, medium-, and long-term action plans that will enable us to rebuild our nation within a specified time frame.”

“We will build a nation without queues for kerosene, gas, and fuel; a nation free of power outages, a nation with plentiful resources where agriculture can freely flourish; a nation where the future of the youth is secure; a nation where people’s labour need not be wasted in queues and in struggles; a nation where everyone can lead their lives freely with three square meals a day.”

“I am undertaking a dangerous challenge. In the Caucasian Chalk Circle, Grusha crossed the broken rope bridge carrying a child that was not her own. This is an even more difficult undertaking. The precipice is deep and its bottom cannot be seen. The bridge is made of thin glass and there is no handrail. I am wearing shoes with sharp nails that cannot be removed. My task is to safely take the child to the other side.”

“I am accepting this challenge for our nation. My goal and dedication is not to save an individual, a family, or a party. My objective is to save all the people of this country and the future of our younger generation. I will undertake this task willingly risking my life if needed and will overcome the challenges facing us. I ask you to extend your support to me in this endeavour.I will fulfill my duty towards our nation.That is my promise to you.”

Ranil  Wickremesinghe has been the target of escalated  insults,jibes, taunts and .invectives after being  appointed premier. These attacks are nothing new to him.It “goes  with the territory” from the time Ranil gained a certain stature in politics. However very few of these attacks are about his ability to repair and revive the economy. Even his vilest critics would grudgingly a=acknowledge that if any one could pull Sri Lanka out of the economic morass it has sunk into, it is Ranil. Indeed that is Wickremesinghe’s unique selling point!

Ranil Wickremesinghe’s flair for providing political leadership for economic revival is  point that  this column has emphasised in the past. “Ranil Wickremesinghe, the UNP Leadership and the TINA Factor” was the heading of an article  written by me  more than eight  years ago. The article published in the  “Daily Mirror”of December 20 2013, was written in the context of the political situation prevailing then.

The all – powerful  President  Mahinda Rajapaksa was seemingly invincible at that time. The chief opposition UNP Leader Ranil Wicremesinghe was perceived by many as a “serial loser” who could not defeat Mahinda.There were some in the UNP who were conspiring to  seize the leadership from Ranil.

My article was  supportive of Ranil and argued then that “there is no alternative”(TINA) to him  as  UNP leader then.I also pointed out that after the war victory euphoria faded away and issues concerning   Sri Lanka’s  economic upliftment  became more important to voters, Ranil Wickremesinghe could be  projected as the better choice. The following excerpts are indicative of what I wrote then –

“Given the triumphalism of majoritarianism  and the perceived popularity of President Rajapakse it may seem virtually impossible that this regime could ever be defeated electorally. But then all things are impermanent and things do change.Political popularity is ephemeral.”

“It must be remembered that Winston Churchill won the war but was booted out in 1945 by Clement Attlee. Indira Gandhi dismembered Pakistan in a military triumph in 1971 but was unceremoniously ejected in 1977 after the emergency.George Bush Sr won the Gulf war but did not get a second term in 1992. George Bush Jnr conquered Kabul and Baghdad but went down at his tail end as the most unpopular US president in history.”

“The Rajapakse regime has contained or diverted resentment against it by using  the war  victory as the opium of the masses. But the war  ended years ago  and it wont be able to justify its shortcomings perpetually through war victory-euphoria. There are misgivings about economic performance.  Charges of nepotism, corruption, repression, authoritarianism , mis-governance and abuse/misuse of power against this regime proliferate.” .

“ Once the euphoria subsides the Country will begin yearning for better economic prospects. Man does not live by  victory on the war front  euphoria alone but also by bread and rice and dhal and sambol. If this regime cannot deliver then people may  welcome change.”

“It is here that Ranil Wickremesinghe could score provided of course that his party would stand by him. He can be projected as the man who could perform an economic miracle. He could also be promoted as the man who would usher in true national unity and unify its people.”

“Wickremesinghe is basically a technocrat and if elected to office would run a smooth and efficient administration. He has a firm grasp of economics and will be the best man to lead the Country on the road to economic emancipation.”

What I wrote then about Ranil being the ideal choice to  spearhead  efforts for the country’s economic upliftment has come true nnow. He has not been elected and is a solitary UNP parliamentarian. Yet he has now donned the leadership mantle in the mission of economic recovery. Ranil like Bertolt Brecht’s Grusha is now carrying the baby across facing fearful odds. Bravo Ranil!

Ranil  Wicremesinghe  was part of the  Junius Richard Jayawardene led  “green elephant”  juggernaut  that swept the general elections of July 21st 1977  winning 141 of the 168 seats then in Parliament. He has been in Parliament continuously since then as an MP except  for a short break from August 2020 to June 2021.  It is an indicator of Ranil’remarkable resilience.No other MP in the present Parliament has as much seniority as  Ranil. Vasudeva Nanayakkara and  Mahinda  Rajapaksa were elected to Parliament before Ranil in 1970. But  they  both lost in 1977 and were not in Parliament for many years.  Rajavarothayam Sampanthan entered Parliament along with Ranil in 1977 but he too suffered breaks in between. Also Sampanthan forfeited his seat in 1983 after refusing to take an oath under the sixth Constitutional Amendment.

The 1977 poll was the last parliamentary election conducted under the old first past the post winner system. Ranil himself  contested and won the newly created Biyagama constituency with a majority of 6769 votes.He polled  22,045. H.A.David Hapangama of the Sri Lanka Freedom Party(SLFP) came second with 15,276 votes.Biyagama was carved out of the  Kelaniya and Mahara electorates in the demarcation of 1976. Ranil’s baptism in politics was as the UNP organizer for Kelaniya in 1975. However when Biyagama electorate came into being , he shifted to the new constituency. It was  UNP strong man Cyril Mathew who  contested Kelaniya and won in 1977.

Forty years is a long time in politics. Wickremesinghe reached a significant milepost in his political journey in 2017  when he completed four decades  of being in Parliament continuously.Starting from 1977, Ranil has weathered parliamentary electoral storms in 1989, 1994, 2000, 2001, 2004, 2010 and 2015 . In 1989 he won from the Gampaha electoral district under the new proportional representation system.Thereafter he was elected to Parliament from Colombo district topping the preference votes among the UNP list of candidates until 2020. Ranil tasted defeat for the first time in 2020.The UNP was trounced at the  August 2020 poll. None of its candidates were elected  including leader Wickremesinghe. But the party was entitled to one nominated MP on the national list. Thus Ranil re  – entered  Parliament as a nominated MP in  June 2021 and has been  for many months  the “lone  elephant”in Parliament.

Ranil  was sworn in as  the new Prime Minister for the sixth time last week. This is a record. Dudley Senanyake was sworn in as PM four times. In the case of Ranil  he has only been a sh premier of short terms.  He first became Prime Minister in May 1994 after  President Ranasinghe  Premadasa was assassinated by the LTTE.Premier DB Wijetunge became President and  Ranil succeeded him as PM.He held office until August 1994. Ranil became Leader of the Opposition from 1994 to 2001.

In  December 2001 Ranil was elected premier  and underwent political cohabitation with President Chandrika  Kumaratunga. She dissolved the UNP-led Govt in 2004  and held fresh elections. The UNP was defeated at the April 2004 elections. Thereafter Ranil was leader of the opposition until 2015.  Ranil holds the “record” for being leader of the opposition for the most number of years.

Maithripala Sirisena  defected from the Rajapaksa Govt and became the presidential candidate of a multiparty coalition headed by the UNP. Sirisena was elected president in January 2015 and appointed Ranil Wickremesinghe s Prime Minister though the UNP had only about 50 seats in Parliament. After the August 2015 Parliamentary poll, Ranil was sworn in as Premier for the fourth time. Though the UNP did not have a clear majority, a  viable Government was formed with the aid of some MP”s from the SLFP.

So Maithripala became President and Ranil the Prime Minister.  Soon  sharp differences –  political as well as personal – began to emerge between both.The “Good Governance” Govt they ushered in lost its  lustre gradually. In one of the worst instances of political  double crossing, Sirisena struck a  deal with Mahinda in October 2018 and appointed him Prime Minister replacing Ranil. After a 52 day political and legal battle Wickremesinghe was restored as Prime Minister again. He was sworn in as Prime Minister for the fifth time in December 2018.

The  Easter Sunday bomb attacks of April 21st 2019 radically transformed the political climate. Former Defence Secretary Gotabaya  Rajapaksa spearheaded the return of Rajapaksas to power by getting elected President on a “Strong man leader for national security”platform. In the Parliamentary elections Sirisen saved his skin by aligning with the Rajapaksa led Sri Lanka Podujana Peramuna(SLPP) and got elected as an MP.

Wickemesinghe however underwent  political difficulties at the hands of his  deputy Sajith Premadasa who formed the Samagi Jana Balavegaya(SJB). Most of the UNP MP’s deserted Ranil. So did the minority party allies of the UNP. The grand old party was routed  at the 2020 election. None of its candidates were elected  including leader Wickremesinghe. But the party was entitled to one seat on the national list and Ranil re  – entered  Parliament as a nominated MP in  June 2021. The lone UNP Parliamentarian was sworn in  a year later as Prime Miniser for the sixth time on May 12th 2022.

Despite his lengthy political career ,Ranil has never been elected President.  However it must  not  be forgotten  that the Presidency was lost by Ranil twice due to the Liberation Tigers of Tamil Eelam (LTTE). In 1999 the abortive assassination attempt   by the tigers on Chandrika Kumaratunge injured her. She lost an eye. This  helped her win by riding the sympathy wave. In 2005 the LTTE prevented Tamils from voting through an enforced boycott. This reduced Wickremesinghe’s potential votes resulting in a narrow margin of defeat.It later became known that Mahinda Rajapaksa had struck a deal with the LTTE in regard to the boycott.

In 2010 and 2015 Ranil  did not contest the presidential elections . He stood down  in favour of Sarath Fonseka and Maithripala Sirisena respectively. In 2019 after protracted political wrangling , Ranil  let the UNP deputy leader Sajith Premadasa contest  the presidential elections. Currently there is much speculation that Ranil Wickremesinghe could become President after a dignified exit by Gotabaya Rajapaksa. That seems a remote possibility at this point of time. However as Doris Day sang in “The man who knew too much” movie  – “Que Sera, Sera, Whatever will be, will be”.

Let me conclude the first part of this article on a personal note. I entered journalism as a trainee reporter on the Tamil daily “Virakesari” in 1977 the  same year that Ranil Wickremesinghe  entered Parliament. My first chance of speaking to Ranil for the first time was after the 77 poll. I uttered just one word  and he responded with two  words. What happened then was this.

When Ranil Wickremesinghe  won for the first time in 1977  there was a lot of excitement among the old hands at “Virakesari”. This was because Ranil’s father Esmond Wickremesinghe had been the chairman of a group of newspapers to which the “Virakesari” also belonged for some years in the late sixties and early seventies of the 20th century. Later Esmond pulled out and the “Virakesari” came under the re-structured Express Newspapers of Ceylon Ltd.

Some of the old timers  at “Virakesari” like veteran photographer Rodrigo would  keep referring to Esmond as “chairman” though Industrialist A.Y. S. Gnanam was the  Express newspapers chairman in 1977. Ranil  was appointed Deputy minister of Foreign Affairs at the age of 28 after being elected MP. One morning when  details of the new ministers and deputy ministers were announced , Rodrigo was on the phone  talking to someone. When I passed by, Roddy  thrust the phone into my hands and said “chairman’s son  Ranil is deputy foreign minister. congratulate him”. So I simply said one word “Congratulations”!. He replied “Thank You”.That was all. I handed the phone back to Rodrigo.

I never got the chance to interact with Ranil Wickremesinghe in my professional capacity as a journalist during the years I was in Sri Lanka. It so happened that the news rounds I covered never brought me into Ranil’s orbit. I did not cover ministries under Wickremesinghe in those days and never got the chance to talk to him.

Even in terms of gathering political news and inside stories,, Ranil Wickremesinghe  was not one of my  ministerial sources in the JRJ cabinet. I relied on ministers like Lalith Athulathmudali, Gamini Dissanayake, Anandatissa de Alwis, E.L. Senanayake, Saumiyamoorthy Thondaman, A. C. S. Hameed, K. W. Devanayagam ,,Gamani Jayasuriya and Festus Perera for that.

In my case the only occasion I interacted with Wickremesinghe “socially” was in 1985 during the time of Margaret Thatcher’s visit to Sri Lanka. Former “Sunday Leader” editor Lasantha Wickrematunge and I were working at “The Island” at that time and were in Kandy to cover her visit.

Ranil Wickremesinghe, Education and Youth Affairs minister at that time invited us for dinner. I found him to be a genial conversationalist and amiable personality. He was well-read and well-informed. Though I cannot remember the details of he conversation now, I do recall being immensely impressed by his  vast knowledge of men and matters.

We joked  much and laughed  lot.I remember that when the band came around, Ranil picked “Kandy Lamissi” by Mariazelle, to be played. He was a bachelor then and we teased him about who his “menike” was. He took it good-humouredly. It was a very pleasant evening.

I left Sri Lanka in 1988. While writing to “The Sundy Leader” from Canada I got to know  about Ranil’s views on certain issues  – like the Oslo-facilitated peace process – through Lasantha. I did not interact with Ranil directly.

In Dec 2013 I wrote an  article  in the “Daily Mirror” that I have referred to in this article  earlier. Ranil telephoned me from Colombo and thanked me for it. In 2014 , I wrote an article titled “LTTE- enforced boycott lost Ranil the presidency in 2005”.It was published in the “Daily Mirror” of October 24th 2014. Again the UNP Leader Wickremesinghe telephoned me directly and thanked me.

In that article I had  explained in detail about  how and why the LTTE  wanted  Ranil’s defeat. I later heard from UNP sources that  copies of the article had been distributed widely at “Srikotha” then.. I was also told that Ranil Wickremesinghe had mentioned my name and the  article  at a public meeting.  He reportedly  told the audience to read  DBS Jeyaraj’s article to know the truth about the 2005 Presidential election.
